title: Senior Software Developer to FA Solutions
description:
Join FA Solutions and play a key role in shaping innovative investment management technology. As a Senior Software Developer, you’ll design and deliver high-quality, scalable solutions that power our platform, contributing to robust performance and real client value in a fast-evolving fintech environment.

**About FA Solutions**  

FA Solutions is a leading fintech company providing a cloud-based investment management platform trusted by financial institutions worldwide. We combine technological excellence with deep industry expertise to deliver innovative, scalable solutions for our clients. At FA Solutions, you will be part of an international team that values professionalism, collaboration, and continuous growth. Together, we enable smarter finance.

**About the role**  

As a Senior Software Developer at FA Solutions, you will contribute across the full software development lifecycle - from specification and implementation to testing and release.


You will work with complex, business-critical features in our order management system (OMS). This includes order raising, blocking, allocation, placement, and building integrations to trading platforms for order execution. Our customers manage various asset classes, so understanding how equities, fixed income, funds, and ETFs operate is important. Knowledge of investment products such as fx contracts (spot, forward), options, and futures is also appreciated.


In this role, you will handle complex requirements with a high degree of autonomy, translating them into well-designed, scalable solutions of strong quality. You will also contribute to building highly reliable, high-throughput services in a distributed systems environment.

**Key responsibilities**  

Your main tasks include:

* Specifying and designing technical solutions based on business requirements
* Developing high-quality, maintainable code, including unit tests
* Documenting and demonstrating your work to stakeholders
* Reviewing peers’ code and participating in acceptance testing
* Contributing to release-related technical activities
* Working as part of an agile development team, following internal processes, values, and guidelines

**Your profile**


To succeed in this role, you have excellent communication skills and a strong understanding of asset management or finance, combined with solid experience in a similar role at a software company.


You are able to balance strategic thinking with attention to detail, prioritize effectively, and maintain a clear overview even in complex projects.

**We expect you to have:**

* 5+ years of experience in software development within the financial domain
* Experience with Java and SQL databases
* Familiarity with trading-related standards such as ISO 20022 and the FIX protocol.
* Experience working with systems that require high reliability and performance.
* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work with complex requirements
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (Finnish or Swedish is considered an advantage)


It is an advantage if you have experience in building scalable systems that handle large volumes of data, as is previous work with SaaS application development.

**About the application**  

In this recruitment process, FA Solutions is collaborating with Fincruit. For any questions regarding your application, please contact the responsible recruiter, Cecilia Lantz, at cecilia.lantz@fincruit.se or 073 997 22 79.

title: Fullstackutvecklare
description:
**Om rollen**


Vi söker en utvecklare med några års erfarenhet som är nyfiken på AI och vill utvecklas vidare i både konsultrollen och som utvecklare.


I rollen kommer du att arbeta nära både kollegor och kunder med att utveckla digitala lösningar där AI är en naturlig del av arbetet. Du behöver inte vara AI-specialist, men vi tror att du redan idag använder AI-verktyg i din vardag och är intresserad av hur de kan skapa värde i riktiga verksamheter.


Hos oss får du möjlighet att växa i uppdrag tillsammans med erfarna kollegor och successivt ta större ansvar i både tekniska lösningar och kunddialoger.

**Du kommer bland annat att:**

* Utveckla och vidareutveckla digitala lösningar och integrationer
* Arbeta med moderna AI-verktyg som exempelvis Microsoft Copilot, OpenAI och GitHub Copilot
* Delta i utveckling av AI-stödda funktioner och arbetsflöden
* Samarbeta nära kunder, designers, utvecklare och strateger
* Vara med och omsätta verksamhetsbehov till tekniska lösningar
* Bidra till ett team där lärande, samarbete och nyfikenhet står i fokus

**Din profil**

**Vi tror att du:**

* Har cirka 2–3 års erfarenhet som utvecklare och konsult.
* Har erfarenhet av exempelvis .NET, JavaScript, TypeScript eller liknande tekniker
* Är bekväm med API, integrationer och moderna utvecklingsmiljöer
* Har testat eller arbetat med AI-verktyg som ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot eller Microsoft Copilot
* Är nyfiken på hur AI kan användas i praktiken
* Vill utvecklas i konsultrollen och tycker om att samarbeta med kunder och team
* Trivs i en miljö där man lär sig nytt tillsammans

**Vad vi erbjuder**

* Tillgång till ett inspirerande nätverk med närmare 350 kollegor inom Experience
* En trygg anställning med kollektivavtal samt bra pensions- och försäkringsvillkor
* Möjlighet att utvecklas inom både teknik, AI och konsultmässighet
* En kultur som uppmuntrar initiativ, kunskapsdelning och kompetensutveckling
* En arbetsplats som värdesätter balans mellan arbete och fritid

**Ansökan**


Låter det här som något för dig? Då vill vi gärna höra från dig!


Har du frågor om rollen eller om oss på Knowit är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Sandra Skilberg.


Vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!

title: Senior Backend Developer (PHP/Symfony)
description:
Vill du arbeta med moderna tekniker, komplexa system och utveckling som verkligen gör skillnad? Som Senior Backend Developer hos oss får du en central roll i utvecklingen av våra digitala plattformar – med fokus på robusta, skalbara och högpresterande backend-lösningar.


Vi arbetar i cross-functional squads, där samarbete, lärandekultur och kvalitet står i centrum. Här får du både möjlighet och förväntan att ta tekniskt ansvar, bidra med erfarenhet och vara en viktig del av vår tekniska riktning framåt.

### **Vad vi gör**


På Klaravik sammanför vi hundratusentals köpare över hela världen med säljare av maskiner och fordon via vår webbplats klaravik.se. Vi har skapat en auktionstjänst där du dagligen hittar mängder av nya objekt att lägga bud på, och företaget växer ständigt. Under 2025 hade vi över 160 000 auktioner och nådde en auktionsomsättning på 4,7 miljarder och prognosen pekar på fortsatt stark tillväxt. Klaravik är en del av en stark nordisk koncern med flera framgångsrika tillväxtvarumärken.

### **Vad ditt jobb blir**


Som Senior Backend Developer kommer du att:

* Bygga och vidareutveckla backend-applikationer i PHP med Symfony som huvudsakligt ramverk.
* Ta ansvar för arkitektur, kodkvalitet och best practices tillsammans med andra seniora utvecklare.
* Utforma och optimera databaser samt arbeta med effektiva SQL-lösningar.
* Säkerställa hög kvalitet genom testning, automatisering och peer-to-peer code reviews.
* Arbeta nära produktägare, designers och QA i en squad som tillsammans driver produkten framåt.
* Bidra till lärande och kunskapsdelning – både i squaden och i våra backend-grupper.
* Vara delaktig i att förbättra plattformens prestanda, stabilitet och skalbarhet.
* Använda AI-baserade verktyg som en naturlig del av utvecklingsprocessen, exempelvis för kodgenerering, analys, testning och effektivisering av arbetsflöden.

### **Vi tror att du har**

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av backendutveckling i PHP.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Symfony eller liknande PHP-ramverk.
* Stark förståelse för SQL, databasdesign och backend-arkitektur.
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt i squads.
* Förmågan att ta tekniskt ansvar och driva arbete självständigt.
* God kommunikativ förmåga och en vilja att samarbeta och dela kunskap.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska, då vi arbetar nära varandra i squads och har löpande dialog med kollegor och användare på svenska.

### **Det är meriterande om du också har**

* Erfarenhet av andra PHP-ramverk (Laravel, Laminas, m.fl.).
* Bakgrund inom auktionssystem, e-handel eller andra komplexa transaktionsmiljöer.
* Kunskap inom Azure, molnbaserad utveckling eller containerteknologier.
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD, testautomatisering eller DevOps-praktiker.
* Intresse för eventdriven arkitektur eller microservices.

### **Vem är du?**


Du är en analytisk och strukturerad utvecklare som trivs i ett samarbetsinriktat sammanhang. Du tar ägarskap för din kod, är nyfiken på nya lösningar och gillar att bidra till en kultur av lärande, kvalitet och innovation. Du har också ett intresse av att utvecklas själv och att stötta samt mentorera andra utvecklare inom avdelningen.


Du är bekväm i komplexa system och har förmågan att bryta ner problem till tydliga och hanterbara lösningar. Du tar ansvar för helheten och kan göra genomtänkta avvägningar mellan kvalitet, tid och affärsnytta.


Du bidrar aktivt till ett öppet och inkluderande klimat i din squad och är nyfiken på hur AI kan användas som ett verktyg i utvecklingsarbetet.

### **Varför oss?**


Hos oss får du arbeta med system som har stor påverkan och hög synlighet i verksamheten. Du blir en del av en organisation som satsar på modern teknik, smarta lösningar och där backend har en nyckelroll i vägen framåt. Vi erbjuder en miljö där du får växa, påverka och göra skillnad – tillsammans med kollegor som brinner för sitt arbete.


Vi har en attraktiv kontorslokal ett stenkast från Centralstationen i Lund. Vi arbetar primärt från kontoret och värdesätter närvaro som en viktig del i ett effektivt samarbete.


Du får 6 veckors semester, ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag, pensionslösning och sjukvårdsförsäkring.


Vi har en varm, dynamisk och öppen kultur där vi gillar att göra saker ihop – spelkvällar, AW:s, event & konferenser.

**Anställningsform**: Tillsvidare, 6 månaders provanställning tillämpas.  

**Placering**: Vårt utvecklingskontor i Lund  

**Närvaro**: Minst 3 dagar per vecka på kontoret  

**Start**: Enligt överenskommelse  

**Sista ansökningsdag**: Urval sker löpande


Har du frågor om tjänsten kan du kontakta Johan Alsfjärd på johan.alsfjard@klaravik.se


Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Senior Software Developer to FA Solutions
description:
Join FA Solutions and play a key role in shaping innovative investment management technology. As a Senior Software Developer, you’ll design and deliver high-quality, scalable solutions that power our platform, contributing to robust performance and real client value in a fast-evolving fintech environment.

**About FA Solutions**  

FA Solutions is a leading fintech company providing a cloud-based investment management platform trusted by financial institutions worldwide. We combine technological excellence with deep industry expertise to deliver innovative, scalable solutions for our clients. At FA Solutions, you will be part of an international team that values professionalism, collaboration, and continuous growth. Together, we enable smarter finance.

**About the role**  

As a Senior Software Developer at FA Solutions, you will contribute across the full software development lifecycle - from specification and implementation to testing and release.


You will work with complex, business-critical back-office features for administering investment portfolios. This includes settlement of trades and other investment-related transactions, payment processing, and reconciliation. Our customers manage various asset classes, so understanding how equities, fixed income, funds, and ETFs operate is important. Knowledge of investment products such as fx contracts (spot, forward), options, and futures is also appreciated.


In this role, you will handle complex requirements with a high degree of autonomy, translating them into well-designed, scalable solutions of strong quality. You will also contribute to building highly reliable, high-throughput services in a distributed systems environment.

**Key responsibilities**  

Your main tasks include:

* Specifying and designing technical solutions based on business requirements
* Developing high-quality, maintainable code, including unit tests
* Documenting and demonstrating your work to stakeholders
* Reviewing peers’ code and participating in acceptance testing
* Contributing to release-related technical activities
* Working as part of an agile development team, following internal processes, values, and guidelines

**Your profile**


To succeed in this role, you have excellent communication skills and a strong understanding of asset management or finance, combined with solid experience in a similar role at a software company.


You are able to balance strategic thinking with attention to detail, prioritize effectively, and maintain a clear overview even in complex projects.

**We expect you to have:**

* 5+ years of experience in software development within the financial domain
* Experience with Java and SQL databases
* Familiarity with standard financial messaging formats such as SWIFT MT and ISO 20022
* Experience working with systems that require high reliability and performance.
* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work with complex requirements
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (Finnish or Swedish is considered an advantage)


It is an advantage if you have experience in building scalable systems that handle large volumes of data, as is previous work with SaaS application development.

**About the application**  

In this recruitment process, FA Solutions is collaborating with Fincruit. For any questions regarding your application, please contact the responsible recruiter, Cecilia Lantz, at cecilia.lantz@fincruit.se or 073 997 22 79.

title: Senior Embedded Developer till Elvaco
description:
Vi söker nu en **Senior Embedded Developer** som vill ta en central roll i att bygga nästa generations uppkopplade produkter. Här får du arbeta djupt tekniskt, nära hårdvara, med stort inflytande över arkitektur, säkerhet och systemdesign.


Elvaco är ett snabbväxande och innovativt teknikföretag verksamt inom energisektorn. Som en del av Bemsiq Group inom Investment AB Latour bidrar vi till den globala omställningen mot smartare och mer hållbara energilösningar. Med marknadsledande produkter, stark tillväxt och en entreprenöriell kultur erbjuder Elvaco en spännande miljö för dig som vill göra skillnad i en snabbt föränderlig bransch.

*Häng med och skapa framtiden inom smart mätning!*

**Om rollen**


Vi söker en **Senior Embedded Developer** som vill ta ägandeskap över hela stacken – från bootloader och Yocto till hur funktionalitet exponeras mot applikationslager.


Det här är inte en roll där du “bara kodar” – du bygger system på riktigt.


Du kommer att:

* Ta rå hårdvara bygga ett stabilt Linux-system (Yocto)
* Arbeta nära drivrutiner och HW (SPI, I2C, UART m.m.)
* Designa robust integration mot Java (DBus, sockets, REST)
* Driva security (Secure Boot, TLS, OTA) – ett prioriterat område


Du blir den tekniska bryggan mellan hårdvara och applikation, och en nyckelperson i framtida produktplattformar.

**Vi söker dig som har stark kompetens inom**

*Embedded Linux & Yocto*

* Djup erfarenhet av Yocto / BitBake
* Bygga, anpassa och felsöka Linux-system
* Förståelse för bootkedjan (bootloader kernel rootfs)

*Hårdvarunära utveckling*

* Stark i C/C++
* Erfarenhet av:


	+ SPI, I2C, UART, GPIO
* Kunskap om:


	+ Device Tree
	+ Drivrutiner
* Van att debugga nära hårdvara

*Integration & systemdesign*

* Exponera funktionalitet via:


	+ DBus, sockets, REST, JNI
* Designa stabila gränssnitt mellan Native och Java

*Cyber Security*

* TLS, certifikat
* Secure Boot
* Säker OTA-uppdatering

*Meriterande:*

* Nyckelhantering
* Kryptering av data/databaser
* Säker systemdesign

**Viktiga tekniska områden du kommer jobba med**

* NFC
* Ethernet
* Cellular-modem (LTE/4G/5G)
* Minneshantering

**Vem är du?**

*Du är en senior utvecklare som:*

* Är van att arbeta “underifrån” – nära hårdvara
* Har byggt system, inte bara komponenter
* Gillar att lösa komplexa problem
* Har ett starkt tekniskt driv och tar ansvar för helheten


Det är viktigt att du behärskar engelska både muntligt och skriftligt.

**Vi tycker det är viktigt att du är**

* En lagspelare.
* En person som gärna delar med sig av sin kunskap till kollegor och bidrar till att utveckla deras kompetens.
* Driven och tycker om att få saker att hända samt driva utvecklingen framåt.
* Nyfiken på att lära dig nya saker och tycker om att lösa problem.
* Bra på att prioritera vad som är viktigast.

**Praktisk information**

* Start: Omgående
* Plats: Kungsbacka
* Anställningsform: Heltid och fast anställning

**Varför välja Elvaco?**

* Bli en del av ett värderingsdrivet företag som formar framtiden inom energieffektivitet och hållbarhet
* Arbeta i en engagerad, innovativ och samarbetsinriktad kultur
* Bli en del av en stark ägarstruktur med långsiktighet och stabilitet
* Friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 kr och möjlighet att träna 1 h/vecka på arbetstid
* Fina lokaler och flera årliga tillställningar för att stärka företagskultur och kompetens i bolaget

**Elvacos värderingar**

* Vi sätter kunden i fokus och är enkla att göra affärer med
* Vi är innovativa och strävar alltid efter att hitta den bästa lösningen för våra kunder
* Vi är effektiva i allt vi gör för att minimera resursanvändning
* Vi är pålitliga – vi finns här idag och i framtiden

**ELVACO**


Är du redo att bli en del av en branschledare med mer än 40 års erfarenhet?


Vi är Elvaco, ett svenskt företag specialiserat på produkter och tjänster inom Smart Metering, känt för våra högkvalitativa lösningar. Vår globala närvaro omfattar företag inom fjärrvärme, vatten, fastigheter, el och gas.


På Elvaco är vi mer än bara ett teknikföretag – vi är teknikagnostiker med ett tydligt uppdrag. Vi brinner för öppna mätstandarder och är stolta över att leverera innovativa och tillförlitliga lösningar som ger våra användare kontroll över sin energidata.


Våra partners, både lokala och globala, litar på att vi levererar kvalitet – och våra slutkunder, såsom energibolag och fastighetsbolag, förlitar sig på oss för att forma en hållbar framtid.


Med huvudkontor i Kungsbacka, kontor i Ansbach, Tyskland, och som en del av Bemsiq Group – helägt av Investment AB Latour, ett bolag noterat på Nasdaq OMX med ett börsvärde på cirka 12 miljarder euro – har vi goda förutsättningar för fortsatt innovation och tillväxt.


Bli en del av vårt team med över 70 medarbetare i Skandinavien och Europa – och låt oss tillsammans forma framtiden inom smart mätning.


Läs mer om Elvaco här:  

https://www.elvaco.com/


I denna rekrytering samarbetar Elvaco med Emajsi.


Vid frågor, kontakta Johanna Haraldsson, johanna.haraldsson@elvaco.se, +46 70 995 05 95.


Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Fullstack Developer to Bruce Studios
description:
Bruce Studios is on a mission to redefine how people train, recover, and feel good – every day.
   

  

 With thousands of members and more than 1,000 partner studios across the Nordics, we offer the most flexible way to stay active and well. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re now looking for a curious and skilled Fullstack Developer to join our Tech team at Bruce Studios in Stockholm. You’ll play a key role in building and evolving our digital products, with a strong focus on our exciting new initiative – the Bruce Studios B2B portal – as well as our public web and other services within Bond Group.
   

  

**What You´ll Do**
 Fullstack development (frontend & backend):
   

  

* Build, maintain, and improve features across our B2C and B2B platforms
* Work across the entire stack, from user-facing interfaces to backend services and databases
* Ensure our products are scalable, reliable, and easy to evolve as we grow
* Work closely with designers, product owners, and fellow developers
* Translate user needs and business goals into thoughtful technical solutions
* Take ownership of your work and deliver high-quality solutions end to end
* Proactively suggest improvements and help shape our technical direction
* Support and contribute to other Bond Group services such as Bruce Studios and STC


**What we want you to bring**
* At least 5 years of experience as a developer, preferably in a fullstack role
* Strong skills in frontend development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript; SvelteKit and/or React)
* Experience with backend development, for example using Node.js, Go, or Python
* Good understanding of REST APIs and system integrations
* Experience with SQL databases, preferably PostgreSQL
* A strong interest in usability and building great user experiences
* A collaborative mindset and clear communication skills


**Nice to have:**
* Experience working with B2B platforms
* Interest in or experience with digital health, fitness, or wellness products


**Our values at Bruce Studios**
 At Bruce Studios, our values guide everything we do—from how we work together to how we engage with our community.
   

  

* Own it – We take responsibility, make decisions, and follow through. We’re proactive, honest, and always learning from our mistakes.
* Be engaged – We’re all in. We respect each other’s time, stay curious, and continuously strive to improve.
* Be real – Authenticity is key. We communicate openly, support each other, and create a safe space where everyone can be themselves.
* Be adaptable – Change is constant, and we embrace it. We find solutions, stay flexible, and innovate together.
* Be bold – We challenge the status quo, take risks, and push boundaries while treatingeach other with kindness and respect.


 Want to be part of a team that lives these values every day? Apply now.
   

  

**What We Offer You**
* Fully renovated top-floor office with terrace, ideally located in central Stockholm
* 30 days of vacation
* Pension benefits
* Hybrid work setup with three office days per week
* A welcoming company culture and supportive team
* A Bruce Epic membership (yes, you get to workout too!)


**How To Apply**
 Does this role sound like the right fit for you? Great – we’d love to hear from you!
   

  

 Apply directly via Teamtailor by uploading your CV (in English or Swedish) and adding a short personal note about why you're excited about this opportunity and how you’d contribute to the team.
   

  

 We value a diverse and inclusive workplace, and we warmly welcome applicants of all gender identities, ages, backgrounds, and abilities.

title: Graduate Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The SW Engineer is responsible for conducting, planning, or overseeing one or more aspects of the analysis, design, programming, debugging, and modification of computer programs for commercial or end user applications. This role involves writing code, completing programming tasks, and performing testing and debugging of applications. The SW Engineer also completes documentation and procedures for installation and maintenance, and may interface with users to define system requirements and/or necessary modifications or develop cost estimates, budgets, and schedules.
   

  

 All roles require digital fluency, including the ability to work with emerging technologies such as Generative AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot) to support everyday work.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Conduct analysis, design, programming, debugging, and modification of computer programs for commercial or end user applications.
* Write code, complete programming tasks, and perform testing and debugging of applications.
* Complete documentation and procedures for installation and maintenance.
* Interface with users to define system requirements and/or necessary modifications.
* Develop cost estimates, budgets, and schedules as needed.


 Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree OR relevant work experience.
* Experience in analysis, design, and programming of computer applications.
* Experience in debugging and modifying software programs.
* Experience in writing and maintaining technical documentation.
* Experience in performing software testing and troubleshooting.
* Experience in collaborating with users or stakeholders to gather requirements.
* Experience in developing or supporting installation and maintenance procedures.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in developing cost estimates, budgets, or schedules for software projects.
* Experience in supporting commercial or end user applications.
* Experience in working with cross-functional teams.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Front-end Developer
description:
**Why join us?** 




 We’re on a mission to empower people with disabilities to do what they once did or never thought possible. As the world-leader in assistive communication solutions, we empower our customers to express themselves, connect with the world, and live richer lives.
 



  





 At Tobii Dynavox, you can grow your career within a dynamic, global company that has a clear, impactful purpose - with the flexibility to also do what truly matters to you outside of work. What’s more, you’ll be part of a work culture where collaboration is the norm and individuality is welcomed.
 



  





 As a member of our team, you’ll have the power to innovate for good. You’ll see your ideas in use in new applications, work with the latest technology on leading platforms, and deliver meaningful solutions for our customers.
 



  





**About The Role** 




 As a
 **Front-end Developer** 
 , you will contribute to building and launching our global headless digital experience. You will design, build, and maintain React based front-end applications, ensuring components are reusable, accessible, and scalable across regions, languages and end applications.
 



  





 You will be hands-on developing multilanguage, personalized, and authenticated user experiences powered by headless content management systems (CMS) and customer identity and access management (CIAM) integrations. Your work will include React development, collaboration on the global design system, and integrating front-end applications with APIs, CIAM, and backend services. You will partner closely with Product, UX, Engineering teams, and our Senior Front-end Developer.
 



  





 Your contributions will enable a production ready front-end React-based front-end experience, reusable design system components, personalized and authenticated user flows across markets, and a scalable React codebase.
 



  





**Please note:** 
 This is a
 **fixed-term** 
 (from 1 June 2026 until 31 October 2026) and
 **hybrid role** 
 (2 days per week) based
 **in Östermalm, Stockholm** 
 .
 



  





**In this role you will:** 



* Develop scalable React component architectures and state management patterns.
* Support multilanguage and multi-region experiences, ensuring correct content rendering.
* Support MVP launch, testing, and iteration while maintaining clean, reusable, and well-documented React code.
* Implement UI logic and personalized experiences based on user accounts, roles, regions, and language preferences.
* Integrate React applications with headless CMS platforms (e.g., Contentful, Sanity) and connect front-end experiences to APIs, CIAM, and back-end services.
* Implement CIAM-driven authentication and personalization flows within React applications.
* Optimize React applications for performance, accessibility, SEO, and responsive behavior across devices.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 




 We’re looking for an organized and adaptable experienced professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, can both work independently and in team setting, and brings a service-oriented mindset.
 



  





**Ideal candidates will bring:** 



* 5+ years of hands-on front-end development experience, including React, modern React frameworks (e.g., Next.js), and headless CMS platforms, preferably in multilanguage or multimarket environments.
* Deep understanding of React fundamentals (e.g., component architecture, hooks, state management, and front-end performance optimization) and previous experience contributing to or building design systems or component libraries.
* Experience developing role-based and personalized user experiences and CIAM integrations for login and personalization flows.
* Strong understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG) is preferred.
* Professional fluency in written and spoken English.
* Experience with agile methodologies is a plus.



  





**Apply today!** 




 We believe in empowering individuals - including our own employees - to reach their full potential. So, if you want to change lives while growing your own career, we’d love to hear from you.
 



  





**Where we stand:** 




 We believe diversity not only enriches our workplace culture, but also gives us a strategic advantage. Working with people from a variety of backgrounds and perspectives helps us all become better communicators, better problem solvers, and better human beings. Our differences make us stronger.
 



  





 Tobii Dynavox values equality of opportunity, human dignity, and racial/ethnic and cultural diversity. Tobii Dynavox does not discriminate against individuals on the basis of race, color, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion, disability, age, veteran status, ancestry, or national or ethnic origin.
 



  





 Equal Opportunity Employer/AA Women/Minorities/Veterans/Disabled

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About us** 




 eve is redefining how people connect.
 



  





 Our AI-native dating experience lets people connect faster, think less, and feel more. By understanding who you actually are, not just what you look like, we cut through the noise so people can focus on what matters: real connection.
 



  





**What joining eve means** 




 We move fast: Deadlines are going to be days, not months.
 



 We fight for quality: High standards, honest feedback, no ego. The product has to work perfectly so people can feel something real.
 



 We think bigger: We're not interested in winning the Nordics or Europe, we're going to redefine a category. We're bold: Stick out or be forgotten.
 



  





**The role** 




 We hit #1 on the App Store. We got the success stories in national media and we're scaling to new markets.
 



  





 Now it's time to build the engineering foundation that matches the ambition: fast, reliable, and built to scale globally. From Stockholm to the US to wherever the category takes us.
 



  





 You'll work directly with the founders on the hardest problems, the systems that make real-time connection feel effortless. No layers, just sharp feedback and the freedom to do the best engineering work of your career.
 



  





 We're looking for someone with serious experience, someone who has scaled consumer apps to millions of users and knows what that actually takes.
 



  





**What you will be doing** 




 Own and develop core features across the full stack, from concept to production. Collaborate directly with Founders, engineering and design to ship fast and iterate faster. Set the technical bar — architecture decisions, code quality, and engineering culture.
 



  





**Who you are** 




 5+ years of experience shipping mobile product at speed.
 



 You have scaled consumer apps to millions of users and know what that actually takes. Deeply comfortable with TypeScript, React Native, and Expo, cloud Functions, and security rules. Able to dip into native iOS/Android when needed, and comfortable with Swift.
 



 Sharp instincts for product, not just code, you care about what you're building and why. Background in early-stage or high-growth startups.
 



  





**What's in it for you** 




 Early-team equity.
 



 Direct access to founders and freedom to build something people use at scale.
 



 Hard problems worth solving, AI, real-time systems, and consumer product at scale.
 



 Centrally located office in Stockholm.
 



 Build something people actually use, live across Sweden today, global tomorrow.
 



 Ignite the feeling that makes people marry each other. There's no better feeling on the planet.
 



  





 If this excites you, apply.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js) - ADE team
description:
At Qred, we’re building the bank for small businesses. Since launching 10 years ago, we’ve grown from startup to profitable fintech scale-up, now generating over 1 billion SEK in annual revenue and supporting 50,000+ entrepreneurs across Northern Europe. We combine smart technology, real data, and human judgment to make financing simple, fast, and fair. With bold growth plans and strong momentum across multiple markets, we’re now looking for a Backend Developer for the next phase of growth.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Backend Developer in our ADE (Automated Decision Engine) team, you will take end-to-end ownership of the infrastructure that powers our credit domain. You will bridge the gap between complex third-party integrations and seamless financial automation, ensuring our systems scale across multiple markets. This mission is about untangling complexity and building the "plumbing" that allows Qred to make fast, responsible lending decisions at scale.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Build and maintain robust third-party integrations and internal credit-logic frameworks to automate financial decision-making.
* Define and evolve our event-driven architecture, leveraging streaming data flows to enhance system responsiveness and reliability.
* Drive technical projects directly with stakeholders and translate business requirements into high-quality Node.js code while maintaining strict security and compliance standards.
* Implement an "Agentic Coding" approach, utilizing AI-driven development practices to increase team velocity and documentation quality.
* Ensure system health by setting up proactive logging, tracing, and alerting for all products within the credit domain.


**What We're Looking For**
 We are looking for a senior-level technical mindset—someone who thrives on solving complex structural challenges and driving alignment within a small, high-impact team. You should be passionate about building scalable frameworks and eager to lead the transition toward more sophisticated, event-driven, and AI-assisted development workflows.
   

  

**Qualification**
* Several years of experience in backend development, specifically within Fintech, Banking, or similar regulated environments.
* Deep technical command of Node.js and experience building secure, scalable financial systems.
* Practical knowledge of event-driven architecture.
* Experience with AWS and a strong understanding of how to manage infrastructure for automated decision-making


**Why Qred?**
 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. We also provide a cutting-edge AI setup that defies the typical constraints of a bank. This is a unique opportunity to leverage agentic coding tools while navigating the rigors of a highly regulated environment.
   

  

 In addition to a meaningful job working with the latest techniques, you will be part of a great culture and work with competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

**One last thing**
 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. We believe our culture thrives when we work together, which is why we have an
 **office-first approach** 
 . To balance this with some flexibility, we have the option of working remotely one day per week.
   

  

 We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: React Native Developer
description:
**About Belong** 




 Belong is pioneering
 **FanTech** 
 by building the
 **financial infrastructure of fandom** 
 . Our platform bridges the gap between cultural engagement and secure financial systems, turning fan activity into verified identity, exclusive access, and real economic value. We are backed by a premier group of investors, including a16z speedrun, Lakestar, Backward Capital, and Prevail, as well as an outstanding circle of angel operators and entrepreneurs. 
 



 By connecting fan behavior with production-ready banking infrastructure, we enable fans to be recognized for their loyalty while allowing artists to participate in the financial value their communities generate.
 



 Our team is led by Nick Holmsten, Founder of Tunigo (acquired by Spotify) and former Global Head of Music at Spotify, and Ash Pournouri, former manager of Avicii and serial entrepreneur behind several community-led initiatives, including Triller, Nordic Angels and Super Human Network. At Belong, we aren't just building a rewards app, we are building the technical rails that make belonging economically meaningful.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We’re seeking a skilled
 **React Native Mobile Developer** 
 to join our innovative team at Belong. You’ll play a key role in building and scaling our fan-first finance app, creating delightful and intuitive mobile experiences that connect music fans with a unique fintech platform. We are looking for an "AI-native" developer who doesn't just use LLMs for basic autocomplete, but deeply integrates advanced agents like
 **Claude Code** 
 or
 **Codex** 
 into their daily engineering workflow to drive unprecedented velocity.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Develop and maintain high-quality, performant mobile applications using
 **React Native** 
 for iOS and Android.
* Collaborate with product designers and backend engineers to implement intuitive user flows and pixel-perfect UI.
* **Leverage Claude Code, Codex, or similar AI engineering agents** 
 to 10x your output, automating routine boilerplate and complex refactors while maintaining rigorous coding standards.
* Optimize app performance and security, ensuring smooth and responsive experiences.
* Integrate APIs and third-party services to deliver seamless fintech and music-driven features.
* Contribute to the technical architecture and ensure scalability of the mobile app.
* Stay at the forefront of AI-assisted development trends and the latest React Native updates.



  





**Requirements** 



* **3+ years of experience** 
 in mobile app development with React Native.
* **Advanced proficiency in AI-assisted coding:** 
 Proven experience using agents like
 **Claude Code** 
 or
 **Codex** 
 to architect, debug, and ship features faster than traditional methods.
* Strong proficiency in
 **JavaScript/TypeScript** 
 and modern React Native frameworks.
* Swedish
 **work permit** 
 (no study permit).
* Experience building and deploying mobile apps to the
 **App Store and Google Play** 
 .
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and third-party integrations.
* Understanding of mobile UX/UI principles (experience with fintech or consumer apps is a plus).
* Familiarity with testing frameworks (e.g.,
 **Jest** 
 ).
* Passion for music and culture, with a fan-first mindset.
* Ability to thrive in a fast-moving, purpose-driven startup environment.
* High sense of ownership; you will be a key team member shaping the future of the product.



  





**Nice-to-Haves** 



* Experience with fintech or payment-related apps.
* Expertise in prompt engineering and fine-tuning AI workflows for mobile-specific challenges.
* Knowledge of native iOS (
 **Swift** 
 ) or Android (
 **Kotlin** 
 ) development.
* Contributions to open-source projects or a strong portfolio of mobile apps.



  





**What We Offer** 



* **Work location:** 
 Stockholm/Hybrid.
* **Competitive Compensation:** 
 Market salary + competitive equity package.
* **Impactful Work:** 
 A rare chance to redefine fandom and fintech for the US market
* **Dream Team:** 
 Join a passionate, top-tier, music-loving team building something extraordinary.
* **Key Role:** 
 Your work and ideas will directly shape the product and user experience.

title: Full-stack Developer
description:
**Introduction**
 We are looking for a Backend-focused Full Stack Developer who enjoys building scalable systems and robust services in modern cloud environments. In this role, you will work primarily with backend development in the .NET and Azure ecosystem, designing and building APIs, services, and cloud-native solutions that power modern web applications and enterprise platforms.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs using .NET.
* Build scalable, cloud-native applications in Azure.
* Model and implement solutions for complex business domains using modern architectural patterns.
* Design databases, data access layers, and integrations using ORMs and data-driven architectures.
* Develop and maintain microservices and distributed systems.
* Ensure systems are secure, performant, and scalable.
* Work with modern DevOps practices including CI/CD, automated testing, and containerization.
* Collaborate with frontend developers and other stakeholders to deliver reliable end-to-end solutions.


**Qualifications**
**You have previous and solid experience with:**
**Backend Development**
* Strong experience in C# and .NET for building backend services and APIs
* Designing and developing RESTful APIs using ASP.NET / ASP.NET Core
* Experience working with service-oriented or microservice-based architectures


**Cloud & Infrastructure**
* Building and deploying applications in cloud environments such as Azure, AWS, or GCP
* Experience with cloud-native services, scalable architectures, and distributed systems


**Data & Persistence**
* Working with relational databases such as SQL Server or Azure SQL
* Experience with ORMs such as Entity Framework
* Understanding of database design, performance, and data access patterns


**DevOps & Tooling**
* Version control using Git
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and development workflows (Azure DevOps or similar)


**Frontend (supporting Experience)**
* Working knowledge of JavaScript or TypeScript
* Experience with modern frontend frameworks such as Angular, React, or Vue
* Basic understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design


**Characteristics That Can Spell Success For This Role Are**
* Curious and eager to continuously learn new technologies and approaches.
* Collaborative team player who enjoys sharing knowledge and working closely with others.
* Takes ownership and drives work from idea to implementation.
* Solution-oriented with the ability to break down complex problems into practical solutions.
* Communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Strong communication skills in Swedish and English, both spoken and written, to effectively communicate with customers and stakeholders.

title: JavaScript Software Engineer - EAX
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm - Hybrid 3 times per week
   

  

**Report into** 
 : Engineering lead
   

  

 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

 At our core, Electronic Arts is a game maker connecting hundreds of millions of players globally to some of the world's greatest games. The EAX team is crucial to creating that connection through products that grow and engage our community of players. Some of our work includes: EA PLAY, our multi-platform subscription for PC, PS4, Xbox One and Steam; the EA desktop app, EA's direct-to-consumer PC games platform; and a host of other consumer experiences and strategies, all with the goal of engaging players across platforms and within our games.
   

  

 EAX In-game Experiences team is responsible for EA Connect, our social overlay facilitating cross-platform party, voip, quick messaging and game invites, used by multiple games such as FC, Battlefield, Madden and NHL.
   

  

 We are looking for someone to help us build experiences like these, using JavaScript/React.
   

  

 We are also responsible for the EA Connect mobile app.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* You will help develop products used in multiple EA games
* You will work with an embedded JavaScript engine inside various game engines such as Frostbite
* You will partner with game teams and ensure the code works in multiple configurations and on several platforms
* You will be part of the broader engineering group, and an important contributor to the EAX team based in Sweden.
* You will design systems and APIs and contribute to technical design and reviews


**Qualifications**
* 3+ years of JavaScript programming experience
* Experience using TypeScript
* Experience using React and/or React Native
* Experience of web and/or mobile applications


**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm - Hybrid 3 times per week
   

  

**Report into** 
 : Engineering lead
   

  

 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

 At our core, Electronic Arts is a game maker connecting hundreds of millions of players globally to some of the world's greatest games. The EAX team is crucial to creating that connection through products that grow and engage our community of players. Some of our work includes: EA PLAY, our multi-platform subscription for PC, PS4, Xbox One and Steam; the EA desktop app, EA's direct-to-consumer PC games platform; and a host of other consumer experiences and strategies, all with the goal of engaging players across platforms and within our games.
   

  

 EAX In-game Experiences team is responsible for EA Connect, our social overlay facilitating cross-platform party, voip, quick messaging and game invites, used by multiple games such as FC, Battlefield, Madden and NHL.
   

  

 We are looking for someone to help us build experiences like these, using JavaScript/React.
   

  

 We are also responsible for the EA Connect mobile app.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* You will help develop products used in multiple EA games
* You will work with an embedded JavaScript engine inside various game engines such as Frostbite
* You will partner with game teams and ensure the code works in multiple configurations and on several platforms
* You will be part of the broader engineering group, and an important contributor to the EAX team based in Sweden.
* You will design systems and APIs and contribute to technical design and reviews


**Qualifications**
* 5+ years of JavaScript programming experience
* Experience using TypeScript
* Experience using React and/or React Native
* Experience of web and/or mobile applications


**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: AI & Software Developer – Laboratory Innovation
location: Upplands Väsby och Sollentuna, Stockholm County, Sweden
description:
At ALS, we encourage you to dream big.
   

  

 When you join us, you’ll be part of a global team harnessing the power of scientific testing and data-driven insights to build a healthier future.
   

  

**ALS i Sollentuna (Mikrolab Stockholm AB) är ett mikrobiologiskt konsultlaboratorium, labbet ingår i ALS Scandinavia AB, (ALS Group). Vi utför mikrobiologiska analyser för kunder inom kategorierna läkemedel, medicinteknik och vatten. Labbet innehar GMP-certifiering och ackreditering för mikrobiologiska analyser. Våra analyser baseras på europeiska och amerikanska farmakopéer, ISO-standarder och andra erkända standarder. Vi hjälper även kunder med specialstudier, valideringar, omgivningshygien samt rådgivning inom mikrobiologi.**
 Läs mer på www.alsglobal.se
   

  

**Vill du använda AI, kodning och data för att modernisera laboratorievärlden på riktigt?**
 Vi bygger ett litet, snabbfotat team i Sollentuna med fokus på att ta ny teknik hela vägen från idé till fungerande lösningar i labbmiljö. Nu söker vi dig som gillar att koda, bygga, testa och förbättra — och som tycker att det är roligt att använda AI och mjukvara för att skapa konkret värde i verksamheten.
   

  

 Det här är inte en roll för dig som bara vill prata om innovation. Det är en roll för dig som vill bygga den.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som
 **AI & Software Developer** 
 kommer du att arbeta nära laboratorieverksamheten för att utveckla smarta digitala lösningar som gör arbetet enklare, snabbare och bättre. Du blir en del av ett litet team med stor frihet, högt tempo och möjlighet att påverka både arbetssätt och tekniska lösningar.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta i gränslandet mellan:
   

  

* AI
* programmering
* dataintegration
* dashboards och visualisering
* automation av digitala arbetsflöden


 Fokus ligger på att omsätta teknik till praktisk nytta i en traditionell laboratoriemiljö.
   

  

**Exempel på vad du kommer att göra**
* bygga Power BI-dashboards med data från flera olika källor
* skapa datalänkar mellan analysinstrument och labbdatasystem
* utveckla scripts, verktyg och enklare applikationer för att automatisera arbetsmoment
* använda ALS AI-språkmodeller för att bygga smarta AI-agenter som underlättar analytikernas vardag
* integrera AI i befintliga programstrukturer och arbetssätt
* identifiera ineffektiva manuella moment och ta fram smartare digitala lösningar
* gå från idé och prototyp till lösning som faktiskt används i verksamheten


**Egenskaper**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är en person som gillar att få saker att hända. Du behöver inte vara senior, men du behöver vara driven, tekniskt stark och nyfiken. Vi letar mer efter rätt mindset än efter en lång meritlista.
   

  

 Du kanske är i början av din karriär eller har några års erfarenhet, men du har redan börjat bygga din egen tekniska verktygslåda och vill använda den i en roll där du får stor påverkan.
   

  

**Vi tror att du har**
* utbildning inom datateknik, systemutveckling, automation, teknisk fysik eller liknande — eller motsvarande praktisk erfarenhet
* intresse för dataflöden, integrationer och digital utveckling
* ett genuint intresse för AI och hur det kan användas i verkliga arbetsmiljöer


**Det är meriterande om du också har erfarenhet av**
* Power BI
* SQL
* API:er och systemintegration
* utveckling av interna verktyg eller scripts
* AI/LLM-lösningar, agenter eller promptbaserade arbetsflöden
* laboratoriedata, instrumentdata eller LIMS


**ALS erbjuder**
 ALS är en global aktör inom laboratorietjänster och analys. I den här rollen blir du en del av en miljö där teknik, data och automation får en allt viktigare roll i att utveckla framtidens laboratorieverksamhet.
   

  

 Hos oss får du möjlighet att:
   

  

* arbeta nära verkliga behov i verksamheten
* bygga lösningar som snabbt kan göra skillnad
* jobba med AI, kodning och dataintegration i praktiken
* vara med och modernisera en traditionell miljö med stor förbättringspotential
* få mycket frihet, ansvar och möjlighet att testa nya idéer


 Vi erbjuder en spännande miljö med möjlighet att påverka och utvecklas i ett internationellt företag med fokus på goda värderingar, ansvarstagande och viljan att lyckas.
   

  

 Tjänsten avser en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med sex månaders provanställning.
   

  

 Vi önskar tillsätta tjänsten snarast och kommer att behandla ansökningar löpande. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan ansökningstiden är avslutad.
   

  

**Intresserad?**
 Skicka din ansökan innehållande CV och personligt brev till oss senast
 **den 31 maj 2026**
 För närmare upplysningar angående tjänsten kontakta
   

  

**Fredrik Johansson,** 
 General Manager, Pharmaceutical Europe,
   

  

 08-29 79 00
   

  

**Working at ALS**
 The ALS team is a diverse and dedicated community united by our passion to make a difference in the world.
   

  

 Our values are important to us, and shape how we work, how we treat each other and how we recognise excellence.
   

  

 At ALS, you’ll be supported to develop new skills and reach your full potential. We invest in our people with programs and opportunities that help you build a diverse career with us.
   

  

 We want everyone to have a safe, flexible and rewarding career that makes a positive impact on our people, the planet and our communities.
   

  

**Everyone Matters**
 ALS is proud to be an equal opportunity employer and is committed to fostering an inclusive work environment where the strengths and perspectives of each employee are both recognised and valued.
   

  

 ALS also welcomes applications from people with all levels of ability. Reasonable adjustments to support candidates throughout the recruitment process are available upon request.
   

  

**Eligibility**
 To be eligible to work at ALS you must be a Citizen or Permanent Resident of the country you are applying for, or either hold or be able to obtain, a valid working visa.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 Please apply on-line and provide a resume & cover letter that best demonstrate your motivation and ability to meet the requirements of this role.
