Vårt största fokus är att ge dig rätt förutsättningar att få leva din passion tillsammans med oss. Var du kommer ifrån är inte relevant - det är vart du är på väg som är intressant för oss. Precis som vi igår inte kunde drömma om det Fortnox som finns idag, så kan du vara med och forma vilka vi är imorgon.*

 **Om tjänsten**


Som Junior Product Designer hos oss får du en unik chans att växa in i en strategisk roll där design står i centrum för bolagets utveckling. Du kommer att arbeta för att förvandla komplexitet till klarhet och skapa upplevelser som känns enkla, lugna och mänskliga.

*Dina huvudsakliga uppgifter:*

* Ingå i ett tvärfunktionellt team där du ansvarar för användarupplevelsen tillsammans med utvecklare och produktägare.
* Lära dig driva UX-research genom tekniker som intervjuer, fokusgrupper och användartester för att förstå våra kunders behov på djupet.
* Använda vårt designsystem Forma för att skapa prototyper och mockups som säkerställer en sammanhängande och tillgänglig upplevelse.
* Säkerställa designkvalitet genom att samarbeta nära utvecklare vid implementering av UI-komponenter.
* Skriva användarcentrerad UX-copy som guidar användaren rätt i systemet.

**Vi söker dig som**

* Har ett genuint intresse för produktdesign och nyligen har avslutat en relevant utbildning eller har något års arbetslivserfarenhet inom UI/UX.
* Är nyfiken på hela designprocessen, från den första lösa idén i en Design Brief till färdigställd produkt.
* Har ett öga för färg och form och vill utveckla din förmåga att skapa flöden med hög användbarhet.
* Tror på kontinuerligt lärande och trivs i en agil miljö med snabba iterationer.
* Är kommunikativ och ser fram emot att dela dina tankar och resultat med kollegor för att få och ge feedback.
* Behärskar svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
* Har en portfolio du kan skicka med i ansökan.

*Vi erbjuder*


Som designer hos oss får du stöd av erfarna kollegor och din Design Area Manager. Vi arbetar med ett modernt mindset kring ägandeskap och kvalitet, där du får utrymme att påverka hur vi designar våra produkter framåt.

**Fortnox - mitt i företagslivet**  

*Fortnox hjälper företag att starta, växa och utvecklas. Med smarta tekniska lösningar för företag och redovisningsbyråer, smidig finansiering och ett ekosystem av starka partnerskap är Fortnox ett nav för företagande i Sverige. Vi drivs av visionen om ett välmående samhälle format av framgångsrika företag.*

*Fortnox grundades 2001 med huvudkontor i Växjö. Läs mer på www.fortnoxgroup.com.*

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**

**Behandling av personuppgifter**


Vi på Fortnox värnar om din personliga integritet. När du skickar in din ansökan till oss kommer vi att behandla dina personuppgifter för att administrera rekryteringsprocessen. Personuppgiftsansvarig är det bolag som du söker arbete hos och är något bolag inom Fortnoxkoncernen. Du kan läsa integritetsmeddelandet i sin helhet på följande länk:


https://apps.fortnox.se/api/eula/document-v1/privacy-policy-recruiting

title: Frontend Engineer - Music
description:
The Rights Systems team builds and operates Spotify Rights Center (SRC), Spotify’s rights management platform that enables the company and its partners to identify, manage, and enforce music licensing rights across creator- and artist-generated content.
   

  

 Comparable in scope to YouTube’s Content ID, SRC is designed specifically for Spotify’s ecosystem and plays an important role in supporting new formats like video and other emerging content types. Over the past year the team launched SRC from inception to a fully operational production platform, now live and used by real rightsholders.
   

  

 The platform includes automated content scanning, policy management, enforcement pipelines, dispute workflows, and analytics. The team has grown from a single squad to three squads (approximately 29 engineers, designers, and product specialists) and continues to scale as a strategic investment area for Spotify over the next several years.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Build and evolve the Spotify Rights Center web application used by music labels, publishers, and other rights holders to manage how their content appears on Spotify
* Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and backend engineers to deliver intuitive and high-quality user experiences
* Develop complex workflows that support large datasets, territory-level permissions, and multi-step processes for managing rights and disputes
* Integrate frontend systems with multiple backend services to support scalable and reliable data flows
* Write performant, accessible, and well-tested frontend code using modern development practices
* Partner with backend engineers to design and evolve APIs that support the needs of the product
* Contribute to product discovery and ideation with engineers, researchers, and product specialists
* Help improve engineering practices and advocate for strong frontend architecture and quality standards
* Support a collaborative team environment that encourages learning, experimentation, and growth


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have experience building modern web applications using TypeScript and React or a similar framework
* You are comfortable managing complex application state and data flows
* You have experience integrating frontend systems with APIs such as REST, gRPC, or GraphQL
* You understand how to design responsive interfaces that handle loading states, pagination, streaming data, and error handling gracefully
* You care deeply about creating intuitive and accessible user experiences
* You have experience building enterprise or B2B applications with complex workflows, permissions, and large datasets
* You write high-quality code and validate it using modern testing approaches such as unit, integration, or end-to-end testing
* You take ownership of solutions from requirements through deployment and iteration based on user feedback
* You enjoy learning new domains and problem spaces and collaborating with teammates to solve meaningful problems


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: UX Lead
description:
**User Experience Lead**
**Team: Product Management - Location: Stockholm**
 Pacera unifies financial close, consolidation and FP&A. With AARO, Aico and Mercur, finance teams combine trusted data with AI-driven insights to enable robust, scalable and intelligent processes for the Office of the CFO.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Pacera is looking for a visionary Senior User Experience Lead to define and own the future of how financial professionals interact with budgeting, reporting and business intelligence software. This is a rare opportunity to build a UX function from the ground up — shaping not just the interface, but the very paradigm through which finance teams plan, analyse and make decisions.
   

  

 You will move Pacera’s users beyond the familiar constraints of spreadsheet-centric workflows into a new era of conversational, process-driven finance — an experience that is intuitive, intelligent and unmistakably Pacera. Across a portfolio of acquired products, you will create a unified design language that drives familiarity, trust and competitive differentiation
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Paradigm Shift - Reimagine financial software UX; moving users from static, spreadsheet-driven processes to dynamic, conversational and process-guided experiences that transform how finance professionals think and work.
* Portfolio Unification - Bring cohesion and brand recognition across a suite of acquired products, creating a seamless, familiar Pacera experience that reduces learning curves and builds long-term user loyalty.
* Function Leadership - Build and lead the UX discipline alongside Product and Engineering — setting standards, tooling, processes and a culture of design excellence that puts Pacera’s experience head and shoulders above the competition.
* UX Vision & Strategy - Define and champion Pacera’s UX vision — establishing what world-class looks like in financial planning, reporting and intelligence software
* Reimagine how finance professionals interact with complex data, moving from manual spreadsheet-driven processes to intelligent, conversational and guided experiences
* Set the long-term design strategy across the product portfolio, ensuring every interaction is purposeful, elegant and differentiated
* Portfolio Design & Unification - Audit, assess and align the UX of Pacera’s portfolio of acquired products, building a unified design system and pattern library
* Create a consistent visual identity and interaction model that builds brand recognition and reduces learning curves across all solutions
* Drive the evolution of individual products toward a cohesive platform experience without disrupting existing user workflows
* Customer & Prospect Engagement - Lead customer discovery sessions, usability studies and co-design workshops with financial professionals to deeply understand real-world need
* Engage with prospects to demonstrate how Pacera’s UX is a genuine competitive differentiator — turning design into a commercial asset in the sales cycle
* Champion the voice of the user in product prioritisation, influencing roadmaps with evidence-based insight and research
* Cross-Functional Leadership - Work as a senior peer to Product Management and Engineering leads, embedding UX thinking into the product development lifecycle from discovery through delivery
* Build, mentor and grow a UX team - Hiring designers, researchers and content specialists as the function scales with the business
* Establish UX governance, design principles and tooling standards including design system, prototyping and research repositories
* Competitive Excellence - Monitor and analyse UX trends in financial software, fintech and adjacent markets to ensure Pacera remains ahead of the curve
* Use qualitative and quantitative data — analytics, NPS, session recordings and user interviews — to continuously improve the experience
* Position Pacera’s UX as a flagship differentiator in analyst briefings, sales cycles and marketing collateral


**What we’re looking for**
* 5+ years of UX / product design experience, with at least 2 years in a senior or lead capacity
* Demonstrable experience in B2B enterprise software — ideally financial, ERP, analytics or SaaS platforms
* Proven track record of leading UX across complex, multi-product environments or post-acquisition portfolios
* Experience building or significantly scaling a UX function, including hiring, mentoring and developing designers
* Deep expertise in user research, information architecture, interaction design and usability testing
* Strong systems thinking — ability to design for consistency and scalability across a product portfolio
* Proficiency in modern design and prototyping tools (Figma essential; design systems experience a strong advantage)
* Ability to translate complex financial concepts and workflows into intuitive, accessible interfaces
* Excellent stakeholder communication — able to present and defend design decisions to C-suite, customers and commercial teams
* A genuine belief that great UX can transform industries — and the ambition to prove it in the financial software space
* Comfortable with ambiguity and energised by defining something new, not just iterating on the familiar
* Collaborative and commercially aware — you understand that great design must serve both users and business outcomes
* Data-informed but instinct-led; you balance research rigour with creative confidence and conviction


**What We Offer**
* Private equity–backed growth journey with strong strategic direction
* Salary range: 700,000 - 800,000 SEK Annual
* Strong benefits package
* Hybrid working options


**About Pacera**
 Pacera is a financial operations software company supporting the Office of the CFO across planning, financial close, consolidation and reporting. With a unified platform consisting of three specialised products, Aico by Pacera, AARO by Pacera and Mercur by Pacera, we help finance teams run critical finance operations with accuracy, control and confidence.
   

  

**Aico** 
 – automates and streamlines financial close processes
   

  

**Mercur** 
 – powers FP&A, budgeting, forecasting, business intelligence and financial analytics
   

  

**AARO** 
 – provides consolidation and group reporting solutions
   

  

 Each product has a strong existing customer base with double-digit year-on-year growth. Together, the unified end-to-end SaaS platform is empowering finance and executive leaders with automation, compliance and actionable insights – enabling faster decision-making, enhanced governance, and visibility.
   

  

 The company is headquartered in Stockholm, with offices in Sweden, Finland, Latvia, the UK and Kenya.
   

  

 Backed by
 **Accel-KKR** 
 , a global technology-focused investment firm, the group has ambitious growth plans driven by both organic expansion and acquisitions. We are now strengthening our operations by investing in key roles that support our platform and future scalability.
   

  

**Apply now**
 This is a permanent, full-time position. The role will be based in our Stockholm HQ.
   

  

 Our process typically involves an initial conversation with our recruitment team, a hiring manager interview, and a final stage interview including a role specific task.
   

  

 We warmly welcome your application.

title: Global Digital Commerce Director
description:
Acne Studios is a progressive luxury house and through collaboration and curiosity, we set high aspirations and strive for excellence. We value everyone’s contribution and embrace feedback to develop ourselves and others. We aim to minimise our environmental impact across all our operations and to address societal challenges in the way we conduct our business.
   

  

 As Global Digital Commerce Director at our Stockholm office, you will shape and lead Acne Studios’ global digital commerce agenda at a critical stage of our growth. This is a senior, high-impact leadership role with global scope, responsible for accelerating revenue, elevating the digital customer experience, and strengthening our omnichannel ecosystem.
   

  

 You will own the global e‑commerce and marketplace business end to end. You will operate at the intersection of brand, culture, technology, and commerce. Always ensuring our digital presence is premium, relevant and unmistakably Acne Studios. You will succeed by navigating a complex organisation, balancing priorities across multiple HQ stakeholders, and partnering closely with regional teams to drive alignment and commercial impact.
   

  

 CULTURE OF COLLABORATION
   

  

 We firmly believe that when you feel supported, included, and trusted, it enables you to enjoy your work and thrive in it. You will be a part of a team of colleagues with diverse roles and backgrounds, each with their unique skills and experiences.
   

  

 WHAT YOU WILL DO
   

  

 As Global Digital Commerce Director, your main contribution will be to set the long‑term vision and lead the evolution of Acne Studios’ global digital commerce and marketplace business, positioning it as a key growth engine and a benchmark for luxury digital experiences. Reporting to the Chief Customer Officer, you will play a vital role in accelerating global revenue growth, strengthening omnichannel excellence, and future‑proofing our digital capabilities by:
   

  

* Defining and leading a global e‑commerce and marketplace strategy that accelerates growth, scalability and long‑term value creation
* Owning the global e‑commerce P&L with full accountability for revenue growth, profitability and commercial performance
* Driving step‑change improvements in UX, site performance, content, and campaigns through advanced analytics, experimentation and customer insight
* Shaping a demand‑led, curated online assortment in close partnership with Buying and Merchandising to maximise relevance and conversion
* Leading performance marketing, CRM, and social commerce to significantly grow customer acquisition, loyalty and lifetime value at scale
* Orchestrating a seamless, premium, and brand‑defining omnichannel customer journey across all digital and physical touchpoints
* Building and deepening strategic partnerships across platforms, technology providers and global marketplaces to expand reach and capability
* Leading, inspiring and scaling a high‑performing global digital commerce organisation with strong commercial and creative capability
* Driving alignment, clarity and momentum across HQ functions and regions within a complex matrix organisation


 WHO YOU ARE
   

  

 You have high aspirations and focus on details that create substantial impact. You enjoy working as a team and you embrace feedback to develop yourself and others. You are curious and thrive in a dynamic environment. Cooperation, respect, and clear communication are important, along with your ambition to learn and grow. If these qualities speak to you, we would love to have you on our team.
   

  

 Specific personal qualities for this role:
   

  

* You are a commercially driven, culturally fluent leader with strong strategic judgement and executional strength
* You thrive in fast-paced, international environments and are skilled at aligning diverse stakeholders around shared goals
* You bring a deep interest in pop culture, digital trends, and contemporary media, and understand how culture shapes brand relevance and consumer behaviour in luxury


 Specific experience and knowledge for this role:
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Economics, Marketing, Digital Commerce, or a related field is required
* Master’s degree or MBA in strategy, digital business, or international management (strongly preferred)
* 8+ years’ senior leadership experience in e‑commerce, ideally within luxury or premium consumer brands
* Proven experience operating in complex, global organisations with multiple HQ stakeholders and regional markets
* Strong understanding of omnichannel commerce, luxury consumer behaviour, and global e‑commerce dynamics
* Solid track record in digital marketing, CRM, and performance-led growth
* Experience with platforms such as Salesforce Commerce Cloud, BI tools, PIM, and OMS
* Fluent in English


 What matters most to us is not whether you master all the listed knowledge and skills. We are dedicated to recognising the potential in each individual. We embrace diversity of people as well as ideas and viewpoints and encourage everyone's individual expression of their own identity.
   

  

 A background check will be conducted on the final candidate as part of our standard recruitment process.

title: AI Enablement Specialist
description:
**Description:** 




 We are looking for a resource focused on AI Enablement and operationalization of AI platforms such as Claude and future AI systems introduced into the organization.
 



 The role is centered around enabling new AI capabilities, establishing scalable and robust services, and supporting successful adoption across the organization.
 







**Key Responsibilities** 




 Drive enablement activities for newly introduced AI platforms and services
 



 Create onboarding material, usage guidelines, service documentation, and operational playbooks
 



 Help establish robust, scalable, and reusable AI services and ways of working
 



 Support coordination between technical teams, platform owners, governance functions, and business stakeholders
 



 Assist with project management and execution within AI enablement initiatives
 



 Support rollout planning, user onboarding, communication, and adoption activities
 



 Contribute to standardization, governance alignment, and service maturity improvements
 



 Identify opportunities to improve operational models, support structures, and user experience around AI services
 



 Goal of the Assignment
 



 Enable the organization to successfully adopt and operationalize AI capabilities through scalable services, structured onboarding, and strong cross-functional coordination around new AI systems and platforms.
 



  





**Skill requirements** 




 - Experience working with AI platforms, Generative AI solutions, or digital enablement initiatives
 



 - Strong project coordination and stakeholder management capabilities
 



 - Ability to create structured onboarding material, documentation, and user guidance
 



 - Experience supporting rollout and adoption of new systems or services
 



 - Understanding of scalable service delivery and operational processes
 



 - Strong communication and collaboration skills across business and technical teams
 



 - Ability to work independently in fast-changing environments
 



 Experience with enterprise collaboration and productivity tools
 







**Beneficial Skills** 




 - Experience with AI platforms such as Claud, Copilot, OpenAI, or similar solutions
 



 - Familiarity with governance, compliance, or AI operating models
 



 - Experience with change management or training initiatives
 



 - Understanding of Agile ways of working and project management methodologies
 



 - Technical understanding of modern AI ecosystems and integrations
 







**Experience, Level 3 Medium** 




 - Knowledge – high competence within current role.
 



 - Experience – is a role model for other Consultants at a lower level.
 



 - Management – takes responsibility for sub-area, can lead a smaller group.
 



 - Independence – able to work independently.

title: Manual QA Engineer
description:
**About Ubiquiti**
 At Ubiquiti Inc., we create technology platforms for Businesses, Smart Homes, and Internet Service Providers, driven by our goal to connect everyone, everywhere. To date, Ubiquiti has shipped over 100 million devices worldwide, from ISP networking products to next generation of IT solutions. Our growth is made possible by the dedicated team of hundreds behind the scenes. From software developers and product managers to designers and strategists, Team UI is driven to achieve our common goal: Rethinking IT. At Ubiquiti, you’ll heighten your potential and broaden your horizons - all while shaping the future of connectivity.
   

  

**We are looking for a highly skilled Manual QA Engineer for our team in Stockholm, Sweden.**
***Please note that applicants must live in Sweden and hold a valid work permit at the time of application to be considered for this role.***
**Responsibilities**
* Preparing test scenarios, test plans, test procedures, and test reports for various projects such as Design Center/InnerSpace, Accounts or Community
* Manual testing for both UX/UI and functionality of the developed software/application to make sure requirements are met or exceeded
* Collaborating with a team consisting of PM, developers and designers


**Requirements**
* At least 5 years of experience in a QA role
* Thorough understanding of QA methodology and best practices
* Hands-on experience in writing and executing test cases and test plans
* Passionate about ensuring great UX for the customers/users of the product you work on
* Excellent communication skills and highly proficient in English (written and spoken)


**Nice To Have**
* Strong interest and experience with applying AI/LLMS to improve productivity and output quality
* Experience with web test automation
* Experienced in scripting languages (e.g. JavaScript / TypeScript)
* Experience with Continuous Integration tools (e.g. Jenkins/AWS Code Pipeline)


**Benefits**
* Competitive compensation
* Occupational pension, health insurance, private health insurance, life insurance and work-injury insurance, and wellness allowance (5000 SEK)
* Flexible work hours and a hybrid work model
* Access to all the latest Ubiquiti products for home use


***Please note that a background check will be conducted in the final stage of the recruitment process***

title: Director of Growth Marketing (1-year cover)
description:
Mentimeter is an engagement tool with a clear goal in mind. To turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we get people to participate, engage and become more productive. Transforming all those passive meetings, airless classrooms and drawn out trainings into valuable and memorable moments.
   

  

 We truly believe that you achieve the best results by doing things together. And that successful leaders need to adopt a curious and collaborative mindset in order to get there. So with you at Mentimeter, you’ll be a big part of the ambition to help over 1 billion people listen, learn and work better together.
   

  

**Is driving growth and performance through digital marketing your thing?**
 Do you thrive on scaling growth across paid, organic and website?
   

  

 Are you comfortable owning both strategy and execution — and being accountable for results?
   

  

 Do you enjoy working closely with Product, Sales, and Marketing to drive real business impact?
   

  

 If this sounds like you,
 **keep reading** 
 .
   

  

 At Mentimeter, we are on a mission to transform meetings and lectures by turning passive audiences into active contributors. With over 30 million users worldwide and a rapidly growing presence, we are shaping the future of engagement, one Menti at a time.
   

  

 Since our launch in 2012, we’ve expanded to Stockholm, Toronto, and Sydney and continue to scale at an exciting pace.
   

  

 We are now looking for a
 **Director of Growth Marketing (1-year cover starting mid June** 
**)** 
 to take ownership of our digital growth and continue building on a strong foundation.
   

  

**What We Bring To You**
 ✅ A culture-defining product, loved by millions of users and customers
   

  

 ✅ A profitable, international scale-up with strong momentum known by it's culture
   

  

 ✅ A collaborative, ambitious, and inclusive team
   

  

 ✅ A role with real impact, where your work directly influences company growth
   

  

**The Role in a Nutshell**
 As Director of Growth Marketing, you will own Mentimeter’s digital growth strategy and execution end-to-end.
   

  

**You Will Lead a Team Across Three Core Areas**
* Paid Marketing: driving scalable, efficient acquisition
* Organic Growth: ensuring strong discoverability across search, LLMs and AI-driven environments
* Website: optimizing the website as a conversion engine for both self-serve and enterprise


 These areas are deeply interconnected. Your role is to ensure they work together as a cohesive growth system, driving registrations, activation, and revenue.
   

  

 You will be directly accountable for how digital contributes to
 **self-serve growth and enterprise pipeline & lead generation** 
 .
   

  

 You will work closely with Product, Sales, and Marketing to ensure alignment and prioritization across teams, and play a key role in shaping how growth is prioritized at a company level.
   

  

 Reporting to the CMO, you will act as the
 **owner of digital growth at Mentimeter** 
 , responsible for both direction and results.
   

  

**The role starts mid June and includes a handover period before the leave.**
**Your Mission: Drive digital growth at scale**
* Lead and develop the team Build and support a high-performing growth marketing team across paid, organic search and website
* Own acquisition and conversion end-to-end Ensure we attract the right users and convert them into active customers
* Scale our growth engine Drive improvements on the website across UX, content, and structure to increase conversion and activation
* Drive enterprise pipeline through digital Ensure the website and campaigns generate high-quality leads and support ABM initiatives
* Align stakeholders and priorities Work across Product, Sales, and Marketing to drive focus and clarity
* Improve performance and efficiency Optimize spend, channels, and funnel performance to increase ROI


**What Success Looks Like**
* Strong growth in high-quality registrations and activation
* Clear contribution from digital channels to revenue and enterprise pipeline
* Improved conversion across key website journeys
* Increased efficiency across paid and organic channels
* A growth system that is scalable, measurable, and continuously improving


**Who You Are**
 🔥You’ve led growth in an environment where multiple teams, channels, and product surfaces need to work together.
   

  

 A proven growth leader with experience in SaaS or product-led environments
   

  

 📊 Data-driven and analytical, with a strong understanding of performance, budgets and ROI
   

  

 🎯 Hands-on across paid, SEO and website — comfortable balancing strategy with execution
   

  

 🌍 A strong understanding of how digital channels work together to drive growth
   

  

 🤝 Experienced in working cross-functionally with Product, Sales, and Marketing teams
   

  

 🚀 Comfortable making decisions in ambiguous environments where there is no clear playbook, prioritizing effectively, and navigating complexity
   

  

 You are not focused on optimizing a single channel — you understand how the system works, and how to make it perform.
   

  

**Your impact**
* Drive meaningful revenue growth through digital channels
* Strengthen how Mentimeter acquires and converts users globally
* Improve how our website supports both self-serve adoption and enterprise pipeline
* Help define how digital growth evolves in an AI-driven landscape
* Build a growth system that continues to scale beyond your time in the role


**Interested?**
 Start date: mid June
   

  

 Let’s build something great together. We’d love to hear from you. 🚀
   

  

**What Mentimeter Can Offer**
 At Mentimeter we can offer a diverse and inclusive work environment supported by smart and driven colleagues. We believe in continuous professional development for all of our colleagues and therefore offer access to a leadership program (including external personal coach) and relevant education to ensure that we continue to be state-of-the-art when it comes to innovating and building Mentimeter. Your place will be in a growing company with lots of career opportunities, working on a beloved product used by more than 300 million people. It’s not all about work though, we also offer a very healthy view on work-life balance.
   

  

 All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package, including pension contributions. Learn more about our benefits by visiting our Benefits & Perks page
   

  

**AI and Hiring at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter, we believe AI helps us work smarter - but it never replaces the human assessment, curiosity, and personal connection that define our culture and our hiring. We use AI as a sparring partner: to bounce ideas, bring new perspectives, support structure, and make our work more efficient. But the meaning, decisions, and interactions always come from people.
   

  

* AI does not screen or decide on candidates.
* There is no automated filtering, ranking, or decision-making in our recruitment process. Every application is reviewed by a person.
* Hiring teams may use AI to support their work - for example, to structure notes, prepare interview questions, or organize their thinking.


 AI strengthens our work, but it does not define it. At Mentimeter, we’re not building an AI-driven hiring process - we’re building a people-first culture, where technology helps us listen, learn, and grow together.
   

  

**Culture at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter we believe in giving everyone a voice - regardless of who you are. So we build a platform that does just that. Our platform is not only our product but also our organization. A platform where people feel safe, where differences are embraced, a place where you can have fun. We strongly encourage applicants who are people of color, LGBTQ+, women, people with disabilities, and/or formerly incarcerated people, and a college degree is not strictly required. In order to give everyone a voice, we need to be as diverse as our users.
   

  

 Learn more about our culture by visiting our Culture page.
   

  

 Review our Privacy Policy for more information.

title: Senior Project Manager with Swedish
description:
Overview: As a PM/Scrum Master, you enable effective agile ways of working in cross‑functional teams developing digiphysical HMI solutions for commercial vehicles. You support teams throughout development, scaling, and implementation phases, where digital interfaces are closely integrated with physical vehicle systems. The assignment requires good product development system, and ways of working. You act as a servant leader and coach, ensuring collaboration, flow, and continuous improvement while balancing agile principles with the demands of industrial product development, quality, and safety. Experience from up‑scaling and implementation phases in digiphysical development is essential, as well as the ability to support teams as solutions transition from development into implementation and industrialization.
 



  





 Responsibilities:
 



  





 Your role will be to act as a scrum master in one of our internal interaction design teams. You should love structure, enjoy setting up processes and coordinate cross functional work in the R&D organisation. We are in a transformation and all agile ceremonies is not completely up and running and we are still investigation our take on the SAFE agile framework.
 



  





 Education (Must Have/Nice To Have): University degree M.Sc technical design or similar Experience
 



  





 (Must Have/Nice To Have):
 



  





 Experience as a Scrum Master in complex product development environments.
 



 Solid experience from HMI and/or digiphysical development, where software, hardware, and vehicle systems interact.
 



 Good knowledge including organization, product development system, and ways of working. Proven experience from scaling and implementation phases, transitioning from development into implementation and industrialization. Experience working in cross‑functional teams within R&D, including software, UX, systems, and validation.
 



  





 Language: English & Swedish professional
 



  





 Personal/Soft Skills: Clear communicator and facilitator – brings structure and alignment in complex and sometimes unclear contexts. Calm and resilient under pressure – creates stability, trust, and focus in uncertain and high‑pressure situations. Servant leader comfortable with change – supports teams through uncertainty, prioritization shifts, and transformation without formal authority.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
***This is us***
 At Avenga, we believe that human creativity empowers technology that matters. Operating globally, our 6000+ specialists provide a full spectrum of services, including business and tech advisory, enterprise solutions, CX, UX and Ul design, managed services, product development, and software development.
   

  

***This is the job***
 In
 **Sweden** 
 within the
 **Banking** 
 industry, we are actively seeking a professional to strengthen our team dedicated to
 **Data Engineering** 
 .
   

  

***This is you***
* Several years of experience as a Senior Data Engineer, including both maintenance and new development
* Strong expertise in SQL and hands-on experience building and maintaining ETL processes, preferably using SSIS
* Proven experience with modern data platforms in Azure, ideally including Databricks
* Experience with data transformation and modeling tools, preferably dbt
* Strong interest in data from a business and user perspective, with an understanding of the importance of reliable and well-structured data
* Proactive, communicative, and comfortable working in cross-functional teams
* Experience from banking, financial services, or other regulated industries is an asset
* Fluent in Swedish and English


***This is your role***
* Manage, develop, and optimize the existing SQL-based data warehouse, including ETL processes built in SSIS
* Ensure stable operations, high data quality, and accurate business logic to support reporting, analytics, and decision-making
* Design and develop data pipelines in a modern Azure environment, with a focus on Databricks and scalable architectures
* Transform and model data (e.g., using dbt or similar tools), ensuring quality, traceability, and reusability
* Contribute to establishing frameworks, ways of working, and best practices for the future data platform (e.g., version control, security, documentation, and coding standards)
* Work closely with BI teams, analysts, and business stakeholders to understand data usage and translate requirements into sustainable technical solutions


***What awaits you at Avenga?***
*At Avenga, everyone matters. We provide equal opportunities in recruitment, career development, and leadership, regardless of race, ethnicity, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, age, religion, or any other characteristic. We are committed to fostering a work environment where our diverse community of employees, candidates, and business partners actively shapes our growth. By bringing together people from different backgrounds and experiences, we build a workplace where everyone feels free to be themselves while honoring the boundaries of others.*

title: Senior Java AD & AMS Engineer | Stockholm, Sweden
description:
**Role** – Senior Consultant  

**Required experience** – Java, Spring boot, Hibernate, Microservices, HTML & JavaScript/jQuery, critical incident management, Monitoring & observability tools (APM, logs, alerts)  

**Location** – Stockholm, Sweden  

**Business Unit** – ADM  

**Compensation** – Competitive (including bonus)  

  

**Job Description**  

Today, the corporate landscape is dynamic and the world ahead is full of possibilities! None of the amazing things we do at Infosys would be possible without an equally amazing culture, the environment where ideas can flourish and where you are empowered to move forward as far as your ideas will take you.  

  

At Infosys, we assure that your career will never stand still, we will inspire you to build what’s next and we will navigate further together. Our journey of learnability, values and trusted relationships with our clients continue to be the cornerstones of our organization and these values are upheld only because of our people.  

  

**Your role*** Buidling, enhancing and modifying applications to meet changing business requirements.

* Managing and maintaining production environment.

*

Besides the professional qualifications, we respect and place equal importance to the candidate’s personality which facilitates success in customer environments. Few traits we look for are:* High analytical skills
* A high degree of initiative, flexibility and adaptability
* High customer orientation
* Quality awareness

**All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer**

title: Staff / Principal Software Engineer, Product
description:
**TL;DR:** We're seeking exceptional senior engineers and technical leaders for our Product team to help build the future of AI software creation. You will work across our entire stack to build features that will empower the next generation of creators and builders.

**Why Lovable?**


Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.


We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.

**What we’re looking for**

* 10+ years of experience designing, building, and shipping production products, with a track record operating at senior engineering levels.
* Deep experience across the full stack, or strong backend depth - fluent in modern frontend (React/TypeScript) and/or backend (Golang, Rust) development.
* Solid understanding of systems design, performance tradeoffs, and scalable architecture for products serving millions of users.
* Strong product sense and the ability to make well-reasoned technical decisions - knowing when to prioritise speed and when to invest in foundational work.
* You own systems end-to-end: architecture, implementation, deployment, monitoring, and iteration.
* You're comfortable navigating ambiguity and driving clarity at an organisational level, not just technically.
* You're based in Stockholm or ready to relocate — this is an on-site, 5-days-a-week role.

**What you’ll do**

**In one sentence:** Do all it takes to build a generational product - scaling the core Lovable experience for millions of users worldwide.

* Build and scale the systems that power Lovable products, ensuring they're fast, reliable, and ready to support millions of users.
* Implement and maintain features across the stack - frontend, backend, and infrastructure - owning them from architecture through to production.
* Design, implement, and maintain backend services, APIs, and infrastructure components built for scale.
* Collaborate closely with ML, design, and product teams to translate capabilities into intuitive, mind-blowing user experiences.
* Drive the full development lifecycle, from technical planning to production launch and post-release iteration.
* Contribute to shaping our technical direction, engineering culture, and product strategy.

 **Our tech stack**


We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:

* **Frontend**: React
* **Backend**: Golang and Rust
* **Cloud**: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* **DevOps & Tooling**: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, , infra-as-code (Terraform)


And always on the lookout for what's next!

**About your application**


Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.


We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.

title: Embedded Software Engineer to Accenture Industry X

title: Utbildningsadministratör till Institutionen för fysiologi och farmakologi
description:
**Var med och utveckla utbildning av högsta kvalitet**
------------------------------------------------------


Utbildningsadministrationen vid institutionen för fysiologi och farmakologi består idag av fem engagerade medarbetare som ansvarar för de olika kursmomenten och utbildningarna inom institutionen. Enheten hanterar även forskarutbildningen och bidrar med övriga studieadministrativa tjänster. Hos oss bedrivs undervisning genom ett stort antal programkurser och fristående kurser inom områdena fysiologi, farmakologi, anestesiologi och intensivvård.  

Vi söker nu en utbildningsadministratör med inriktning system som kommer jobba med särskilt fokus på uppdragsutbildning, uppdragsforskning, utbildningslokaler och IT-infrastruktur. Är det du? Läs mer och ansök nedan.

### **Din roll**


Som utbildningsadministratör har du en central och verksamhetsnära roll i institutionens utbildningsverksamhet. Rollen kombinerar operativ utbildningsadministration med visst projekt- och förvaltningsansvar. Du ansvarar för att samordna, stödja och kvalitetssäkra utbildningsadministration, främst inom grundutbildning men även inom uppdragsutbildning och forskarutbildning. Du arbetar nära kursansvariga, programledning och verksamhetsstöd och fungerar som administrativt stöd genom hela utbildningsprocessen från planering till genomförande och uppföljning. Rollen innebär ett stort eget ansvar för att utbildningsadministrativa processer och rutiner fungerar effektivt, rättssäkert och i enlighet med gällande regelverk.


I rollen ingår bland annat att:

* administrera kurser inom grundutbildning och uppdragsutbildning
* ge administrativt stöd till kursansvariga och programledning
* samordna schemaläggning, lokalbokning samt student- och deltagaradministration
* ansvara för rapportering och dokumentation kopplad till utbildning
* arbeta med kvalitetssäkring och utveckling av utbildningsadministrativa processer


Rollen har även ett särskilt fokus på:

* utbildningsadministrativ samordning och processutveckling inom grundutbildningen
* uppdragsutbildning i samverkan med externa näringslivsaktörer
* utveckling och förvaltning av kurslaboratorier, lektionssalar och IT‑infrastruktur kopplad till utbildning och samverkansprojekt


Du arbetar i gränssnittet mellan akademi, verksamhetsstöd, IT, laboratoriemiljöer och externa partners. Uppdraget kombinerar operativt ansvar med långsiktig utveckling och kvalitetssäkring.


Du får en central roll i institutionens utbildnings- och samverkansverksamhet i en internationell och forskningsintensiv miljö, där ditt arbete bidrar till både verksamhetens kvalitet och samhällsnytta.

### **Vem är du?**


För denna tjänst söker vi dig som har akademisk examen inom samhällsvetenskap eller teknik, eller annan utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant för tjänsten. Du behöver även ha erfarenhet av utbildningsadministration inom högre utbildning, forskning eller annan kunskapsintensiv organisation, likväl som flerårig erfarenhet av projektledning. Du måste ha mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift, samt mycket god datorvana.


Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av arbete i utbildningsadministrativa program som LADOK, InteDashboard, Drupal, Canvas, Lärplattformen itsLearning och schemaläggningssystemet TimeEdit. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av uppdragsutbildning och/eller uppdragsforskning, erfarenhet av samverkan med externa näringslivsaktörer, erfarenhet av laboratoriemiljöer och/eller undervisningslokaler inom högre utbildning samt erfarenhet av förvaltningsstyrning enligt etablerad modell (t.ex. pm3 eller motsvarande).


För att passa i rollen är det viktigt att du är strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten, strategisk, men samtidigt operativ och lösningsorienterad, relationsskapande och serviceinriktad, självständig med god prioriteringsförmåga och trygg i att arbeta i komplexa miljöer med många intressenter. I denna rekrytering kommer stor vikt att läggas vid personliga egenskaper.

### **Vad erbjuder vi?**


En kreativ, internationell och inspirerande miljö fylld av kompetens och nyfikenhet. Karolinska Institutet är ett av världens ledande medicinska universitet. Vår vision är att driva utvecklingen av kunskap om livet och verka för en bättre hälsa för alla. Här bedriver vi framgångsrik medicinsk forskning och har det största utbudet av medicinska utbildningar i Sverige. Som universitet är Karolinska Institutet en statlig myndighet. Det gör att du får goda förmåner genom vårt kollektivavtal. Medarbetare på KI erbjuds också möjlighet till ett flexibelt arbetssätt. Det innebär att om den verksamhet du jobbar i tillåter, så kan du arbeta en del av din arbetstid på distans. Du får även träna fritt i våra moderna friskvårdsanläggningar där utbildad personal finns på plats.

**Placering: Campus Solna, Biomedicum**


För mer information om institutionen, klicka här: https://ki.se/fyfa  

För mer information om våra utbildningar, klicka här: https://ki.se/fyfa/utbildning-pa-fyfa

### **Ansökan**


Ansökan ska göras via rekryteringssystemet Varbi. I denna rekrytering söker du med ditt CV utan personligt brev. I ansökningsformuläret kommer du istället att få svara på frågor om varför du söker jobbet.


Vid tillsvidareanställning tillämpar Karolinska Institutet 6 månaders provanställning.

**Vill du göra skillnad – och bidra till en bättre hälsa för alla? Sök jobb hos oss**
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 1 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100% | Ort: Stockholm | Län: Stockholms län | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: STÖD 2-1973/2026 | Kontakt: Kent Jardemark , | Facklig företrädare: Bodil Moberg, ST-OFR , Helin Norberg, SACO , Elisabeth Valenzuela, SEKO , | Publicerat: 2026-05-14 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-06-03
