title: Erfaren Software Test Engineer till stort Life Science-bolag i Uppsala
description:
Vi söker nu en erfaren konsult inom mjukvarutest till ett spännande uppdrag hos kund i Uppsala. Uppdraget är inom en R&D-avdelning med fokus på mjukvara och produktutveckling, där du kommer att ingå i ett samarbetsinriktat team med mjukvaru-, hårdvaru- och systemingenjörer.


Rollen passar dig som har gedigen erfarenhet av mjukvarutest i komplexa system och som trivs i en teknisk miljö där test, krav, dokumentation och samarbete är centrala delar av arbetet.

**Om uppdraget**
----------------

**Roll:** Software Test Engineer  

**Antal positioner:** 1  

**Start:** 2026-06-15  

**Uppdragslängd:** Till 2027-05-30 initialt, med möjlighet till förlängning  

**Placering:** Uppsala  

**Omfattning:** Heltid, on-site upp till 5 dagar per vecka  

**Deadline för kandidatpresentation:** 2026-05-20


Den valda konsulten förväntas kunna ta cirka fem veckors sommarsemester i juli/tidigt augusti.


**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------


I rollen kommer du bland annat att arbeta med:

* System engineering ur ett mjukvarutestperspektiv
* Design, implementation och underhåll av manuella och automatiserade testfall
* Uppbyggnad och underhåll av testmiljöer, från simulatorer till kompletta system
* Felanalys, defektreproduktion och dokumentation
* Teknisk dokumentation, inklusive design-, krav- och testspecifikationer
* Mjukvarutest i produktutvecklingsprojekt kopplade till avancerade instrument- och filtersystem

**Vi söker dig som har**
------------------------

* Relevant examen inom data, systemvetenskap eller motsvarande
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet i liknande roll
* Erfarenhet av mjukvarutest av komplexa system
* Erfarenhet av simulatoranvändning
* Erfarenhet av manuella och automatiserade tester
* Erfarenhet av testfallsframtagning
* Erfarenhet av kravhantering
* Erfarenhet av nätverksarkitektur och protokoll
* Erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt
* Erfarenhet av Azure DevOps och Git, inklusive versionshantering och branching
* Erfarenhet av ALM-verktyg för krav-, testfalls- och defekthantering
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift
* Möjlighet att arbeta on-site i Uppsala upp till 5 dagar per vecka

**Meriterande erfarenhet**
--------------------------


Det är meriterande om du även har erfarenhet av:

* Automations- och/eller scriptingverktyg
* Produktutveckling inom reglerad, tekniskt avancerad eller instrumentnära miljö

**Personliga egenskaper**
-------------------------


För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är en lagspelare som uppskattar samarbete, kunskapsdelning och att hjälpa kollegor. Du är prestigelös, kommunikativ och tvekar inte att ställa frågor när det behövs.

**Ansökan**
-----------


Skicka in din kandidatpresentation så snart som möjligt. Beskriv tydligt hur kandidaten matchar kravprofilen, inklusive antal års erfarenhet och konkret erfarenhet av relevanta verktyg, arbetssätt och tekniska miljöer.

title: Entry Level Platform Engineer at Jeppesen ForeFlight
description:
We are looking for a motivated and curious Platform Engineer to join one of our internal cloud platform teams at Jeppesen ForeFlight. In this role you will learn how to build, operate, and secure the foundation that makes it easy for our product teams to run their applications securely and efficiently in AWS.  

  

At our office in central Gothenburg, you will work in a one-of-a-kind software development organization with fascinating solutions that make a real difference to people around the world. You will be part of an agile learning organization, surrounded by talented, creative, and dedicated colleagues. You will broaden your perspective by working with 400 professionals from more than 30 different nations, while also being part of a global organization. Most importantly, you will be expected to grow and make a difference.
  

  

Jeppesen ForeFlight´s internal cloud platform consists of two closely collaborating teams that we are now strengthening with an entry level position. You will join a highly qualified and experienced team that owns the core building blocks of our internal cloud platform. We value high code quality, security-first thinking, thorough testing and close collaboration. The team is supportive and used to helping people grow quickly.


Based on your interests and skill set, you´ll be placed in one of the two teams outlined below and you will work with: GitHub, Terraform, AWS, InfraWeave, Backstage, ArgoCD, Istio, Rust, Python, and Linux.

 **Team Forerunners** – Platform CD & CIAM Responsible for ~50 enterprise-grade Terraform modules (VPC, EKS, ALB/NLB, RDS, EFS, SNS, SQS, etc.), component & integration testing, CIAM solutions (Auth0), GitOps with ArgoCD, Istio, and close collaboration with CloudOps on the AWS Landing Zone.

**Team X-Force** – Platform Tooling Develops and maintains our internal fork of the open-source project InfraWeave, contributes back to the community, handles observability & security of the control plane, and operates our Backstage developer portal.

**Position responsibilities (what you will learn and do):**

* Learn to develop and maintain Terraform modules for AWS services together with senior engineers
* Write and run component and integration tests
* Collaborate with product teams to understand their needs and improve developer experience
* Contribute to our InfraWeave fork and Backstage portal
* Help ensure observability, security and reliability of the platform
* Work with GitHub, AWS, Kubernetes (EKS), ArgoCD, Istio and modern observability tools
* Participate in pair and mob programming sessions daily

**Required Qualifications**

* Proficiency in English, spoken and written, Swedish is a bonus
* Good communication skills and a collaborative mindset
* Genuine interest in DevOps, Platform Engineering, cloud technologies and automation
* Bachelor or Master's Degree in Computer Science, IT or equivalent (or close to finishing)

**Preferred Qualifications**


We believe you have an analytical approach to problem solving and a strong willingness to learn. We think you are driven, committed, have a positive attitude and are comfortable in a growing in an international environment.


It is a big plus (but not required) if you have:

* Some experience with Terraform, AWS, Docker or Kubernetes (from personal projects, thesis, or internship)
* Basic scripting skills (Python, Bash, etc.)
* Interest in Infrastructure as Code, GitOps, open source, or developer platforms

**About Jeppesen ForeFlight**  

Jeppesen ForeFlight provides data, software, and insights for the aviation industry, supporting pilots, operators, and flight crews across commercial, military, business, and general aviation. Its platforms cover crew, fleet and flight planning, network and operations management, and flight deck solutions. Combining Jeppesen’s long-standing expertise in aeronautical navigation data with ForeFlight’s digital aviation technology, the company helps customers plan, navigate, monitor, and optimize flight operations worldwide.

**About the talent program**
  

  

**Who are you?**
  

We are looking for individuals who are driven, curious, and have a passion for learning and solving complex problems. You are a technical enthusiast and would love to further explore your critical thinking, logical reasoning, and creativity in your daily work. You thrive in a social and communicative environment and long for a workplace with talented engineers who prioritize teamwork and believe that magic happens when great minds work together.

**The program**
  

These positions are a part of the Earn Your Wings talent program which is a collaboration between Hubbau and Jeppesen ForeFlight. During the yearly talent program, you will be employed by Hubbau and work as a consultant in your specific role at Jeppesen ForeFlight. After that, the ambition is that your journey instead turns into employment directly at Jeppesen Foreflight. Our goal is for you to have a fun and rewarding first year where you will be equipped with the best conditions for the future at Jeppesen Foreflight and your professional life.  



**The cherry on top**
  

During the year, you'll expand your network and skills through dedicated training days. These sessions cover both technical and soft skills, helping you develop problem-solving techniques and see failure as part of the learning process. At Jeppesen ForeFlight, curiosity, creativity, and the courage to challenge ideas are highly valued, equipping you with the mindset and tools to approach technical challenges in new ways. On top of that, you’ll become part of a strong community, enjoying plenty of fun activities and social events throughout the year.
  

  

**Other information**  

We are looking for one individual for this role and the talent program starts on the 31st of August 2026 (2026-08-31).  

This position is full-time employment located at Jeppesen ForeFlight´s office in central Gothenburg. We practice ongoing selection, so do not hesitate to express your interest.

title: Senior Elkraftsingenjör / Systemkonstruktör Elkraft – Forsmark
description:
**"Vi söker talanger – bli en del av VIPAS AB"**
  

  

"Är du en driven IT-professionell som vill utvecklas i en dynamisk konsultmiljö? Bli en del av VIPAS AB och arbeta med projekt som utmanar och inspirerar."

**Vår Verksamhet**


"Vi på VIPAS AB kombinerar teknisk expertis med affärsfokus för att leverera lösningar som verkligen gör skillnad. Genom modern teknik som Java och Python och med vår erfarenhet inom mjukvaruutveckling och DevOps skapar vi innovativa, skalbara lösningar som hjälper våra kunder att nå sina mål."

##### **Vill du arbeta i ett av Sveriges mest avancerade samhällskritiska projekt?**


Vi söker nu en erfaren och självgående **Senior Elkraftsingenjör / Systemkonstruktör Elkraft** till ett långsiktigt uppdrag i Forsmark. Du blir en del av ett omfattande och tekniskt avancerat projekt inom svensk kärnkraftsindustri där säkerhet, kvalitet och hållbarhet står i fokus.


Detta är en unik möjlighet att bidra till utvecklingen av framtidens anläggningslösningar i en miljö med höga tekniska krav och stor samhällsnytta.

##### **Om rollen**


I rollen som Systemkonstruktör Elkraft kommer du att arbeta med systemlösningar och teknisk konstruktion inom elkraft för komplexa industriella anläggningar. Du ansvarar för att omsätta verksamhetens övergripande krav till tekniska lösningar och säkerställa att konstruktion och dokumentation uppfyller gällande regelverk och kvalitetskrav.

##### **Arbetsuppgifter**

* Ta fram och tolka tekniska krav samt omsätta dessa till systemlösningar och tekniska specifikationer
* Arbeta med systemkonstruktion inom elkraft
* Ta fram konstruktionsunderlag och tekniska handlingar
* Granska och kvalitetssäkra konstruktionslösningar på systemnivå
* Samverka med andra teknikdiscipliner i projektet
* Säkerställa att lösningar följer gällande tekniska och administrativa regelverk
* Delta i förfrågningsunderlag, genomförande och detaljkonstruktion

##### **Vi söker dig som har**

* Civil- eller högskoleingenjörsexamen inom elkraft, energi, elektroteknik eller motsvarande
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet inom elkraft och industriella anläggningsprojekt
* Erfarenhet från exempelvis kärnkraft, vattenkraft, energi eller processindustri
* God förståelse för tekniska regelverk och säkerhetskritiska miljöer
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och ta tekniskt ansvar
* Erfarenhet av konstruktionsverktyg såsom **Ides Master Concept/elMaster** är meriterande

##### **Meriterande erfarenheter**

* Erfarenhet från större infrastrukturella eller industriella projekt
* Kunskap inom hög- och lågspänningssystem
* Erfarenhet av multidisciplinära projektmiljöer
* Tidigare arbete inom regulatoriskt styrda verksamheter

##### **Personliga egenskaper**


Vi tror att du är:

* Strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
* Ansvarstagande och initiativrik
* Kommunikativ och samarbetsorienterad
* Teknisk stark med ett högt kvalitetsfokus

##### **Uppdragsinformation**

* **Placering:** Forsmark, Sverige
* **Omfattning:** 100%
* **Start:** Enligt överenskommelse
* **Uppdragslängd:** Hela 2026 med möjlighet till förlängning
* **Distansarbete:** Möjlighet till viss flexibilitet för rätt kandidat, men närvaro på site krävs regelbundet

 **"Bli en del av vårt framgångsrika team"**

* "På VIPAS AB värdesätter vi drivna och engagerade medarbetare. Vi erbjuder attraktiva villkor och en arbetsmiljö som främjar kompetensutveckling och karriärtillväxt. Hos oss får du arbeta med spännande projekt inom flera branscher och bidra till banbrytande IT-lösningar tillsammans med ett erfarent och innovativt team."

**"Vi vill höra från dig"**  

"Tveka inte – skicka din ansökan till **pooja@vipas.se** och upptäck möjligheterna hos VIPAS AB."

**Behörighet för ansökan :-** "För att kunna ansöka krävs svenskt medborgarskap eller ett giltigt arbetstillstånd för Sverige."

**Din ansökan**


"Intresserade kandidater uppmanas att skicka in CV och personligt brev. Observera att rekryteringen sker löpande, vilket innebär att tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum."

title: Teknisk Projektledare / Delprojektledare SCADA – Stockholm
description:
**"Bli en del av vårt växande IT-konsultteam"**  

  

"VIPAS AB växer och söker nya talanger inom IT-konsulting. Här får du möjlighet att bidra till innovativa projekt och utveckla din kompetens i en professionell miljö."

**"Om oss"**


"VIPAS AB strävar efter att göra komplex IT enkel och affärsnyttig. Vi utvecklar skräddarsydda lösningar med de senaste teknikerna, inklusive Java och Python, och vårt kompetenta team inom mjukvaruutveckling och DevOps säkerställer att varje projekt genomförs med kvalitet, precision och innovation."

#### **Teknisk Projektledare / Delprojektledare SCADA – Stockholm**


Vill du vara med och utveckla framtidens kollektivtrafik i Stockholm?  

Nu söker vi en erfaren och tekniskt kunnig Projektledare / Delprojektledare inom SCADA till ett omfattande och samhällsviktigt projekt hos Trafikförvaltningen i Region Stockholm.


Du får möjlighet att arbeta i ett strategiskt projekt med fokus på framtidens SCADA-arkitektur och moderna driftledningssystem inom kollektivtrafiken.

##### **Om uppdraget**


Projekt RISTA syftar till att implementera en ny arkitektur för SCADA-system hos Trafikförvaltningen. Projektet omfattar utveckling och framtidssäkring av system som stödjer driftledning och tillgångsförvaltning inom Stockholms kollektivtrafik.


Som Teknisk Projektledare / Delprojektledare kommer du att ansvara för utpekade delar av projektet samt bidra operativt och strategiskt genom projektets olika faser. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med tekniska specialister, verksamhet och andra projektintressenter.


Du blir en del av sektionen Tillgångssystem & Driftledning som arbetar med SCADA- och tillgångssystem som övervakas via Driftledningen.

##### **Arbetsuppgifter**

* Leda och koordinera tekniska delar inom SCADA-projektet
* Ansvara för delprojekt och säkerställa leverans enligt tidplan
* Delta i tekniska analyser och lösningsdiskussioner
* Samverka med interna och externa intressenter
* Stödja implementation av ny SCADA-arkitektur
* Bidra med teknisk kompetens och erfarenhet inom industriella styr- och övervakningssystem
* Hantera varierande arbetsuppgifter genom projektets olika faser

##### **Vi söker dig som har**

* Erfarenhet av teknisk projektledning eller delprojektledning
* Erfarenhet av SCADA-system och driftledningsmiljöer
* Förståelse för industriella styrsystem och systemarkitektur
* Erfarenhet från infrastruktur-, transport- eller industriprojekt är meriterande
* God samarbetsförmåga och vana att arbeta i komplexa projektmiljöer
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat och driva projekt framåt

##### **Uppdragsinformation**


Plats: Stockholm / Kungsholmen  

Hybridarbete möjligt enligt överenskommelse  

Omfattning: Heltid, 40 timmar/vecka  

Möjlighet till förlängning: 1+1+1 år

 **Utvecklas med VIPAS AB**

* "Att arbeta på VIPAS AB innebär mer än bara ett jobb – det är en chans att växa professionellt. Vi erbjuder flexibla möjligheter i olika branscher och attraktiva anställningsvillkor enligt Teknikföretagens kollektivavtal. Här blir du en del av ett kreativt och tekniskt kunnigt team som driver innovation inom telekom, fordon, detaljhandel och bank."

**Bli en del av vårt team**  

"Är du redo för nästa utmaning? Skicka din ansökan till **pooja@vipas.se** och ta chansen att växa med VIPAS AB."

**Viktigt att veta**  

"Ansökningar accepteras endast från personer som har svenskt medborgarskap eller giltigt arbetstillstånd i Sverige."

 **Ansök nu**


Intresserade kandidater uppmanas att skicka sitt CV och personliga brev. Vi rekryterar kontinuerligt – ansök omedelbart för att inte missa möjligheten!"

title: Engineering Manager
description:
Join our journey and help shape the future of connected mobility. Lead engineering excellence, collaborate with global teams, and drive digital transformation!

**WirelessCar’s Journey**


WirelessCar drives the future of mobility by connecting vehicles and developing cutting-edge digital services. We help leading brands—like Volkswagen, Volvo, and Jaguar Land Rover—innovate, enhance mobility, and accelerate their digital transformation. Join us and shape the next era of automotive technology!


We are looking for an Engineering Manager to lead and develop our Engineering Capabilities within Connected Services.


In this role, you will be responsible for building and driving cross-functional engineering capabilities such as architecture, security, engineering processes, and technical governance that support multiple teams and delivery areas.


You will combine strong people leadership with accountability for engineering outcomes, ensuring that our capabilities evolve in line with business needs while enabling high-quality, efficient, and sustainable delivery across the organization.


This is a key role in shaping how we scale engineering excellence across a complex, global delivery environment.

**What you will do**


As an Engineering Manager, you will:

* Lead and develop a team of senior engineers and functional specialists within engineering capabilities such as architecture, security, delivery support, and engineering processes.
* Own the performance, engagement, and long-term development of your team
* Drive the development and execution of capability strategies aligned with business and delivery goals
* Ensure high quality, efficiency, and consistency in engineering practices across teams
* Drive engineering governance and compliance across domains, including standards, audits, and risk management
* Lead and prioritize cross-functional capability initiatives and backlogs (e.g. innovation, AI, security, and engineering improvements)
* Support technical direction and long-term capability development, including architecture, technology adoption, and continuous improvement
* Collaborate closely with Delivery Managers, Engineering Managers, Product, and customers
* Operate across teams and domains, influencing stakeholders and driving progress without direct authority
* Contribute to organizational change and continuous improvement of engineering practice
**We believe that you bring**

* Proven experience leading engineering teams or senior technical specialists
* Strong background in software development and modern engineering practices
* Experience working in complex, cross-functional environments
* Experience driving delivery, quality, and engineering improvements
* Strong stakeholder management skills, including customer interaction
* Experience leading change initiatives and implementing new ways of working
**Additional qualifications**

* Broad technical understanding across multiple domains (e.g. cloud, security, DevOps, software engineering practices)
* Experience leading senior specialists and subject matter experts
* Proven ability to operate horizontally across teams and influence without direct authority
* Experience driving complex initiatives (such as technical investigations & RFQs, engineering governance & standards, and security & compliance work)
* Strong strategic and systems-thinking capability
**Leadership profile**


We are looking for someone who:

* Takes full accountability for both people and outcomes
* Balances team needs with business priorities
* Communicates clearly and handles difficult conversations when needed
* Builds trust while driving performance and results
* Acts as an extension of leadership, not just a team manager
**Why join us**


You will be part of a transformation where we are strengthening engineering ownership, improving delivery, and building long-term capability across our organization.


This is an opportunity to:

* Shape how engineering capabilities are built and scaled
* Work in a global, cross-functional environment
* Influence both technical direction and organizational development
**We offer you**

* High-tech company that offers an exciting working environment
* Involvement with Electric Vehicle services and products that drive sustainability
* Tech fund where you pick your choice of tech tools
* Flat organizational culture founded on trust and autonomy; at WirelessCar, you are not just a number
* Work-life balance and free access to the gym at the Gothenburg office
* Flexible working hours and a hybrid workplace
**To join our journey**  

WirelessCar is always on the move, often into uncharted land. We are curious, believe in collaboration and are always open to new ideas on how we can make a difference. When you join our journey, you will be part of a great crew of highly competent and warm hearted people from all over the world.
  

  

**Way of working**  

At WirelessCar we believe in a Hybrid Remote work setup. The work location is at our headquarters in Gothenburg, Sweden. We offer flexible working hours and a hybrid workplace.

**Recruitment process**


Ready to help shape secure mobility solutions for the future? Apply now and join our journey! We apply rolling recruitment, and the position may be closed before the application deadline.


Note before you apply:

* Our company language is English so please write your application in English.
* Applicants must have a valid work permit.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Är du en erfaren DevOps Engineer med intresse för teknik och att ständigt utvecklas? Vill du hjälpa våra kunder att göra världen lite bättre genom digitala lösningar?
   

  

 I DevOps-rollen på HiQ kommer du arbeta i varierande kunduppdrag i en rad olika branscher (exempelvis finans, retail, industri och försvar) där du bidrar med din expertis och kunskap. Du blir en viktig del i det tekniska teamet där ditt engagemang för utveckling och drift skapar utrymme för att effektivisera och automatisera mjukvaruutvecklingen av framtidens digitala tjänster.
   

  

 Som DevOps Engineer har du särskilt fokus på att designa, bygga och vidareutveckla CI/CD‑pipelines och automationslösningar som gör det snabbt, säkert och förutsägbart att gå från kod till produktion. Du arbetar tätt tillsammans med utveckling, test och drift och tar ett tydligt ansvar för bygg- och leveransflödena hos våra kunder.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har
   

  

* Högskole-/universitetsexamen i datateknik, datavetenskap, systemvetenskap eller annan relevant inriktning
* Minst 3–5 års erfarenhet av DevOps‑arbete med tydligt fokus på CI/CD, build och release
* Erfarenhet av att bygga och förvalta CI/CD‑pipeliner
* Mycket god vana av att automatisera bygg, test och deploy
* Erfarenhet av versionshantering i större utvecklingsteam
* Erfarenhet av testautomatisering och integration av tester i pipelines
* Förmåga att analysera och förbättra bygg- och leveransflöden
* Svenskt medborgarskap samt flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


 Meriterande
   

  

* Erfarenhet av virtualiserade eller molnbaserade byggmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av att agera teknisk ägare för CI/CD i större utvecklingsorganisationer


 Vi erbjuder dig
   

  

 Hos oss får du utmanande uppdrag både ute i våra kunders organisationer och i vår egen regi, där HiQ har helhetsansvar för projekten. Du får möjlighet att delta i utvecklingen av våra kunders framtida tjänster som förenklar människors vardag, tillsammans med kunniga kollegor som gärna delar med sig av sina kunskaper och erfarenheter. Vi erbjuder en kreativ arbetsmiljö där du kan utvecklas som människa, kollega och bli ännu bättre på det du redan är bäst på, samtidigt som du blir en del av ett värderingsstyrt bolag som värdesätter glädje och gemenskap och som hittar på mycket roligt tillsammans.
   

  

 Varför HiQ
   

  

 Sedan 1995 har HiQ varit konsultbolaget som förenklat världen för både kunder och slutanvändare med hjälp av teknik, design och kommunikation. HiQ har alltid fokuserat på två saker: att ha kul på jobbet och att leverera lösningar utöver förväntningar – det är vad som driver oss framåt! Vi HiQare är stolta över att ha en kultur som präglas av resultat, ansvar, enkelhet och glädje. Vi tror på att arbeta tillsammans för att nå våra gemensamma mål och strävar efter att hjälpa varandra att fortsätta växa och utvecklas. Hos oss får du utöver chansen att utveckla din egen kompetens också möjlighet att lära, leda och inspirera dina kollegor.
   

  

 I denna rekrytering tillämpar vi löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan ansökningstiden har gått ut. För att göra rekryteringsprocessen så rättvis och objektiv som möjligt kommer det att ingå urvalsfrågor, intervjuer, tekniska tester, referenstagning och bakgrundskontroll.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Founding Engineer
description:
**Join Corafone as a Founding AI Engineer**
*This is an onsite role in Stockholm, Sweden. If you apply from outside of Sweden you must be able to relocate without support.*
 The accounts receivable market is massive, complex, and overdue for a revolution. Corafone is automating and transforming it end-to-end, with AI voice agents already live with customers across the US. The traction is real. The timing is perfect. And we are well positioned to take the market.
   

  

**Why join Corafone**
* The founding team has done this before. Experienced founders who have scaled startups from zero to one to 100, and are doing it again.
* Backed by investors who wrote the first check for Deepgram and the founders of Moltbook. People with a track record of backing the right teams at exactly the right moment, supporting Corafone in the journey.
* The rocket is already off the ground. This is your chance to get on board before we land on the moon.
* Work directly with F500 companies, in a culture combining Silicon Valley speed, with a Scandinavian touch


**What You'll Do**
* Design and ship world-class AI voice agents that handle real calls, real payments, and real compliance end to end
* Solutions engineering: Work directly with customers in a hands-on, relationship-driven industry
* Product engineering: Shape the technical foundation of a product that's already in production and scaling fast
* Sit at the table with the founding team and help decide where this goes next


**Who You Are**
* You have a passion for startups and building
* 5+ years of full stack experience with strong system design and architecture instincts
* Comfortable building from scratch and making decisions without a playbook
* Willing to work closer to US hours
* Proven experience with AI agents or LLMs in production


**Bonus If**
* You’ve led a team
* You’re an ex-founder or were an early hire at a startup


**What We Offer**
* Real equity at pre-Series A prices, with competitive pay
* Work at a SF type company, in the Nordics
* A founding team that moves fast, a market ready to be taken, and work that actually matters

title: Quality Engineer (AI & Automation)
description:
**About Younium**
 Younium is an AI-driven, powerful cloud platform that handles complex subscriptions, streamlines financial operations, and delivers massive reporting capabilities in one place. It makes subscription management effortless, intelligent, and ready for scale. We are in full growth mode. You’ll thrive in a high-energy, creative, and transparent environment fueled by collaboration. With hubs in Amsterdam, Kraków, Stockholm, Malmö, and Philadelphia, plus remote contributors, we’re building a truly global team. Want to make a real difference for subscription businesses around the world? Come join us.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re looking for a Quality Engineer with a strong interest in AI and automation to help redefine how quality assurance works at Younium. As our engineering teams continue to move faster with the support of AI tooling, we want to ensure quality scales alongside delivery - not by relying on more manual testing, but by building smarter, AI-driven ways of validating software.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll work at the intersection of development, QA, and cloud/platform engineering to design and implement modern testing and automation capabilities. You’ll have a key role in shaping how we approach quality engineering in an AI-first environment.
   

  

 What you’ll do
   

  

 Key responsibilities
   

  

* Build AI-Driven Testing Capabilities - Develop AI-powered test agents and automated workflows that can interpret requirements, execute relevant test scenarios, and provide actionable feedback to engineering teams
* Drive Intelligent Test Automation - Use LLMs and AI tooling to generate, maintain, and improve unit, integration, and end-to-end test coverage across the platform
* Own QA Pipeline Automation - Design and maintain automated quality gates within CI/CD pipelines using tools such as GitHub Actions and Tekton to ensure reliable and trusted deployments
* Improve Test Reliability & Coverage - Identify gaps in testing, reduce flaky tests, and use AI-assisted approaches to continuously improve confidence in releases
* Support Testing of AI Features - Help define testing strategies and evaluation frameworks for AI-driven product capabilities where outputs may not always be deterministic
* Enable Engineering Teams - Build reusable tooling, frameworks, and best practices that make AI-driven QA capabilities accessible across the engineering organisation
* Collaborate Across Engineering - Work closely with developers, CloudOps, and platform teams to embed quality throughout the software delivery lifecycle


**Requirements**
* Strong interest in AI and automation – Hands-on experience experimenting with LLMs, AI agents, prompt engineering, or AI-assisted workflows
* Experience with software testing and quality engineering – Understanding of automated testing strategies across unit, integration, and end-to-end testing
* Comfortable writing and maintaining code – Able to build automation, integrate APIs, and work with CI/CD tooling and scripting as part of everyday engineering work
* Experience with CI/CD and modern engineering workflows – Familiarity with GitHub Actions, pipeline automation, and deployment workflows
* Cloud and infrastructure understanding – Experience working with Azure or other major cloud platforms, including infrastructure, deployments, and infrastructure-as-code concepts
* Interest in AI evaluation and observability – Understanding of how to validate and evaluate AI-driven functionality and measure reliability of AI-assisted systems
* Collaborative and proactive mindset – Comfortable working in fast-moving teams with shifting priorities and taking ownership of quality-related initiatives Bonus
+ Experience with AI agent frameworks or AI evaluation tooling
+ Familiarity with Tekton or Kubernetes-based pipelines
+ Experience working with Azure AI / Microsoft Foundry
+ Background in development, DevOps, or platform engineering
+ Interest in improving engineering productivity through AI-assisted workflows


 What we’re looking for
   

  

 We’re looking for someone curious, hands-on, and genuinely excited about the intersection of AI and quality engineering. You enjoy experimenting with new tools and approaches, and you’re motivated by solving complex quality challenges in modern software development environments.
   

  

 You take ownership, learn quickly, and are comfortable navigating between development, automation, infrastructure, and testing. Whether your background is in QA, development, or DevOps, what matters most is your ability to build practical solutions and help engineering teams ship high-quality software with confidence.
   

  

 Our Stack
   

  

 GitHub and GitHub Actions, Azure, Microsoft Foundry, Tekton, and modern AI/LLM tooling. You don’t need experience with every technology in our stack, but you should be comfortable learning new tools and adapting quickly.
   

  

 Why Younium?
   

  

* True work-life harmony: We offer a remote-friendly setup, flexible hours, and boundaries you can trust.
* Real impact: Work on one of the most innovative platforms in subscription management and directly influence how our customers scale.
* An employer who genuinely cares: We are proud to offer a workplace where everyone can thrive, feel safe to be themselves, and do their best work.
* Unforgettable yearly kick-offs: Join the entire Younium team on annual trips (recent we have been to Croatia, the Netherlands, and Sweden).
* Continuous learning: Access mentorship, learning programs, and real opportunities to grow your skills.
* A talented, supportive team: Work alongside highly skilled, driven teammates who make things happen today rather than tomorrow. And just as importantly, who collaborate closely and truly enjoy spending time together — from regular team lunches to relaxed after-work hangouts.


 At Younium, we hire exceptional people. What matters to us is your drive, that you take ownership, and the value you deliver — not your gender, sexual orientation, ethnicity, age, ability, or religion.
   

  

*📆 ⏰ starting date for this position will preferably be ASAP (after summer).*
*📍 Please note that we do not offer any relocation package, nor will we recruit outside the EU for this position. This role will have a hybrid remote setup.*

title: Delivery Solution Architect – Hybrid Cloud, Infrastructure & AI Solutions
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**About HPE Professional Services**
 HPE Professional Services is HPE’s innovative IT services organization, helping customers accelerate outcomes from their digital transformation initiatives. We combine industry-leading technology with deep expertise to design, integrate, and deliver modern hybrid cloud and AI-enabled solutions that drive measurable business value and superior customer experiences.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a
 **Solution Architect** 
 , you will serve as a trusted advisor and technical leader, designing end-to-end hybrid cloud and AI-enabled architectures for enterprise customers. You will work closely with customers, sales teams, and delivery organizations to align business goals with scalable, secure, and intelligent IT solutions.
   

  

 This role is ideal for a senior architect who is passionate about Private cloud and AI technologies, thrives in complex customer environments, and enjoys shaping future-ready digital platforms.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will:
   

  

* Establish trusted advisor relationships with senior and executive-level stakeholders.
* Design detailed, well-documented hybrid cloud and AI-enabled solutions that address customer requirements and RFPs, in close collaboration with sales teams.
* Lead workshops to gather business, technical, and data-related requirements across stakeholders.
* Facilitate goal-aligned discussions and propose architectures aligned with HPE and partner portfolios.
* Provide strategic guidance on hybrid cloud, AI, and data platform adoption, aligned with business objectives.
* Define and communicate hybrid cloud and AI adoption roadmaps, including key milestones and dependencies.
* Develop cost models, including AI workload cost estimation, and recommend strategies to optimize infrastructure and cloud spend.
* Design end-to-end architectures integrating on-premises infrastructure, cloud platforms, and AI/ML services.
* Support and lead implementation efforts, ensuring security, compliance, ethical AI principles, and best practices.
* Oversee migration of applications, data, and AI workloads between on-premises and cloud environments.
* Collaborate with data and application teams to enable AI-ready platforms, including data pipelines, model hosting, and inferencing capabilities.
* Monitor and optimize hybrid cloud and AI platform performance, leveraging automation and AIOps where applicable.
* Stay current on emerging trends in AI, machine learning, cloud-native platforms, and automation, and contribute to the technical community.


**Required Technical Experience**
 You bring strong depth across infrastructure, cloud, and emerging AI technologies:
   

  

* 7+ years of experience as a Cloud Engineer, Cloud Architect, or Infrastructure Architect.
* Strong background in hybrid cloud, IaaS, PaaS, DevOps, and CI/CD.
* Solid market knowledge of IT consulting services related to cloud and AI transformation.
* Hands-on experience with containers, Kubernetes, and microservices.
* Knowledge of Linux and Windows operating systems.
* Solid understanding of AI/ML architecture concepts, such as:
+ Model training vs. inferencing
+ Data pipelines and feature stores
+ GPU/accelerator-based workloads

* Familiarity with MLOps principles, automation, and lifecycle management of Private Cloud solutions.
* Understanding of IT infrastructure components (compute, storage, networking, virtualization) and their role in business workloads.
* Proficiency in infrastructure and solution architecture methodologies.
* Familiarity with ITIL / ITSM frameworks (preferred).
* Experience in large-scale enterprise environments is a strong advantage.


**You Are**
**Professional & Leadership Skills**
* A strong professional with business acumen and a high sense of accountability.
* Comfortable building trusted relationships with C-level and senior executives.
* A collaborative leader who coaches others, promotes teamwork, and resolves conflicts constructively.
* An excellent communicator with strong presentation, verbal, and written communication skills.
* Able to translate complex cloud and AI concepts into clear business value.
* Fluent in both the local language and English.


**Why Join Us?**
 At HPE Professional Services, you will help customers design and implement
 **future-ready Hybrid cloud and AI architectures** 
 that enable innovation, efficiency, and competitive advantage. You will work with leading-edge technologies, collaborate with highly skilled professionals, and play a key role in shaping intelligent digital platforms for global enterprises.
   

  

 If you are passionate about cloud and AI technologies, have a strong track record of delivering complex architectures, and thrive in a dynamic, customer-focused environment, we invite you to apply.
   

  

**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business Growth, Change Management, Client Expectations Management, Coaching, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Centric Solutions, Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Information Technology (IT) Infrastructure, Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Process Improvements, Product Services, Relationship Building {+ 5 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 #sweden
   

  

 #operations
   

  

**Job**
 Services
   

  

**Job Level**
 TCP\_04
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**No Fees Notice & Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer**
*It has come to HPE’s attention that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud whereby scammer impersonate HPE or HPE-authorized recruiting agencies and offer fake employment opportunities to candidates. These scammers often seek to obtain personal information or money from candidates.*
*Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors
 **will never charge any candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process.** 
 The credentials of any hiring agency that claims to be working with HPE for recruitment of talent should be verified by candidates and candidates shall be solely responsible to conduct such verification. Any candidate/individual who relies on the erroneous representations made by fraudulent employment agencies does so at their own risk, and HPE disclaims liability for any damages or claims that may result from any such communication.*

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
Bannerflow is a fast-growing global SaaS company building a Creative Intelligence Platform that enables enterprise brands to predict, create, and optimize advertising across channels.
   

  

 We’re on a company-wide AI transformation journey, where AI and agentic workflows are becoming a core part of how we build and innovate, with high expectations on adoption across all teams.
   

  

 Our teams are highly autonomous, collaborative, and we are now looking for another passionate engineer to join us!
   

  

**⭐ Ready for a new challenge? Here is what we offer:**
 At Bannerflow, we build flexible and autonomous teams based on trust. We believe that when people are given the freedom to take ownership and work closely together, great things happen. Our engineering culture is shaped by openness, respect, and a shared drive to keep improving.
   

  

 We are passionate about solving real problems and making a meaningful impact, and we are always open to exploring new ideas. With us, you will be part of a growing tech company where ideas are valued, feedback is encouraged, and personal development is supported. We bring the energy of a fast-moving company together with the stability of a proven product and a strong customer base.
   

  

 You will join a team where motivation is high, knowledge is shared openly, and having fun is part of everyday life, whether it’s through hackathons, board game nights, or spontaneous team activities.
   

  

**Our Ever Evolving Tech Stack Currently Consists Of**
* TypeScript / Angular
* C# / .NET
* MongoDB
* Azure & Kubernetes
* Cloudflare
* …and some more stuff


**🦋 Are you + Bannerflow = true?**
 We are looking for a Platform Engineer who will keep our platform and infrastructure secure, stable and future-proof as we scale to new markets. As a Platform Engineer, you will not only build cool solutions together with our Platform team and Chief Architect, you will also work side by side with other product teams; educating, guiding, collecting feedback and removing bottlenecks from our development teams.
   

  

**So, what are we looking for?**
 A senior Platform Engineer with experience planning, designing, and implementing DevOps processes, strategies, and tooling to remove hurdles and pains from product development life cycles. You’ll need a strong sense of ownership, personal drive, and the ability to write clean, efficient, and well-documented code. You are interested in keeping up with best practices and like to continually improve our product and processes. We believe you are an excellent communicator that thrives in a highly collaborative environment.
   

  

 In addition to these traits, we’re looking for expertise in,
   

  

* Deep knowledge of kubernetes
* Solid familiarity with Azure Services
* Networking
* Linux
* IAC DSLs like Terraform or Biceps
* CI/CD best practices and tools like Github Actions, ArgoCD, ASO and Helm
* Disaster recovery
* You are deeply invested in AI and how it can drive value and enable more efficient ways of working.


 We believe that our employees are the key to our success and we are dedicated to building a positive and supportive work environment where our employees can thrive and grow. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive team and welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds, experiences, and abilities.
   

  

 If you are ready to take your career to the next level, we want to hear from you!

title: Kafka Engineer
description:
Maintain and monitor the Kafka platform to ensure stable and reliable operation.
 



 Perform basic Kafka administration (topics, configurations, access control).
 



 Provide 2nd3rd level support to users and development teams.
 



 Troubleshoot incidents, performance issues, and message flow problems.
 



 Advise users on Kafka usage, best practices, and configuration.
 



 Maintain basic technical documentation

title: JavaScript Software Engineer - EAX
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm - Hybrid 3 times per week
   

  

**Report into** 
 : Engineering lead
   

  

 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

 At our core, Electronic Arts is a game maker connecting hundreds of millions of players globally to some of the world's greatest games. The EAX team is crucial to creating that connection through products that grow and engage our community of players. Some of our work includes: EA PLAY, our multi-platform subscription for PC, PS4, Xbox One and Steam; the EA desktop app, EA's direct-to-consumer PC games platform; and a host of other consumer experiences and strategies, all with the goal of engaging players across platforms and within our games.
   

  

 EAX In-game Experiences team is responsible for EA Connect, our social overlay facilitating cross-platform party, voip, quick messaging and game invites, used by multiple games such as FC, Battlefield, Madden and NHL.
   

  

 We are looking for someone to help us build experiences like these, using JavaScript/React.
   

  

 We are also responsible for the EA Connect mobile app.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* You will help develop products used in multiple EA games
* You will work with an embedded JavaScript engine inside various game engines such as Frostbite
* You will partner with game teams and ensure the code works in multiple configurations and on several platforms
* You will be part of the broader engineering group, and an important contributor to the EAX team based in Sweden.
* You will design systems and APIs and contribute to technical design and reviews


**Qualifications**
* 5+ years of JavaScript programming experience
* Experience using TypeScript
* Experience using React and/or React Native
* Experience of web and/or mobile applications


**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
A specialist in identity, secure transactions, and digital services, IN Groupe is the global leader in secure identity and trust services. Every day, our 4,000 employees across 40 countries work to ensure that everyone has access to a reliable and secure identity, both in the physical and digital worlds. With our solutions and our international network of 10 R&D centers, we support governments and businesses in more than 130 countries.
   

  

 Joining IN Groupe means helping to shape the future of the identity and secure transaction market. Become part of our international teams — driven by innovation and proud to design solutions that make life easier and protect personal data for millions of people around the world.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a Senior backend engineer to join our Stockholm office with strong, hands‑on expertise in modern Java, experienced in building and maintaining legacy Java code as well as setting up new microservice based applications. Brings solid proficiency in CI/CD and Azure DevOps (or comparable platforms), along with practical knowledge of cloud environments, containerization technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, automated testing practices, and operating services reliably in production.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Focus on backend development, with responsibility for services, databases, and system integrations.
* Develop, improve, and maintain services with a strong focus on reliability, scalability, and long-term maintainability.
* Select and use technologies based on problem-solving value, not trendiness.
* Ensure that deliveries are on time and secure, always balancing speed with quality.
* Collaborate closely with teammates and stakeholders, enabling fast and sustainable delivery.
* Over time, take a leading role in driving improvements in both technology and ways of working.


**Our Tech Stack (key areas for this role)**
* Java (primary language: deep expertise required)
* SQL
* REST
* Docker, Kubernetes
* Azure dev ops


**About You**
* Highly experienced in backend Java development and proficient with Azure.
* Results-oriented: you deliver what is needed, when it is needed.
* Pragmatic: you enjoy new technology but choose what best solves the current problem while limiting technical debt.
* Humble and grounded: you listen, collaborate, and keep the team's best in mind.
* Independent yet collaborative: you take initiative but thrive in teamwork.
* User-focused: the end user's experience is always your guiding star.


**Qualifications**
* Extensive experience in Java backend development (main requirement).
* Experience with both legacy Java code and modern development practices.
* Solid understanding of deploying in Containers
* Cyber security in general and PKI experience in particular is beneficial.
* Professional proficiency in English.

title: Software Architect
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Software Architect / Solutions Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will be responsible for
 **defining and overseeing the overall system architecture** 
 for our AI-powered platform. You will collaborate with engineering teams, product managers, and stakeholders to design
 **scalable, secure, and high-performing solutions** 
 that align with business objectives.
   

  

 You will play a key role in shaping our
 **technology strategy, evaluating new tools and frameworks, and ensuring best practices** 
 in software design, cloud infrastructure, and system integration.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and maintain the overall architecture and system design for scalable and efficient software solutions.
* Provide technical leadership to engineering teams, guiding them in best practices for architecture, coding, and system scalability.
* Design and document high-level system diagrams, data flows, and API structures.
* Evaluate and recommend technologies, frameworks, and cloud services to optimize performance, security, and cost-efficiency.
* Ensure high availability, fault tolerance, and security in all architectural decisions.
* Oversee system integrations, including microservices, APIs, and third-party services.
* Work closely with DevOps and SRE teams to ensure smooth deployment and operational reliability.
* Establish coding and architecture standards, ensuring maintainability and scalability of codebases.
* Identify and mitigate technical risks, ensuring system resilience and future scalability.
* Conduct architecture reviews and performance audits to continuously improve system efficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in software development and architecture.
* Strong expertise in system design, cloud computing, and microservices architecture.
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform) and cloud-native architectures.
* Proficiency in backend technologies (e.g., Node.js, Python, Java, .NET) and experience with modern frontend frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, Vue).
* Knowledge of databases (SQL and NoSQL), caching strategies, and data pipelines.
* Experience with event-driven architectures, API design, and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Strong understanding of security best practices, identity management, and encryption techniques.
* Ability to evaluate trade-offs in architectural decisions, balancing scalability, cost, and complexity.
* Familiarity with DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation).
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex architectural concepts to technical and non-technical stakeholders.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Senior Video Coding Researcher
description:
**Grow with us**
**Our exciting opportunity**
 Ericsson is Europe’s leading network technology company and a global pioneer shaping the 6G era. Our 6G vision will transform business and society in the 2030s through secure, efficient, and sustainable communications.
   

  

 Video already accounts for 75% of mobile data traffic and its importance is accelerating rapidly. Immersive XR, generative media, cloud gaming, autonomous systems, digital twins, and AI-native services all depend on breakthrough advances in video compression. To deliver these services on a global scale, video compression and standards must keep advancing in efficiency, flexibility and sustainability.
   

  

 We are looking for researchers and engineers from the video coding community who want to shape future standards and see their innovations deployed globally. Join our international team of world-class researchers at the forefront of both advanced signal processing and neural network–based compression. You will invent, implement and evaluate algorithms that power next-generation video coding standards. Your work will directly influence future codec evolution and the technology stack powering 6G media services worldwide.
   

  

**What you will do:**
* Invent and prototype novel video coding tools (signal processing and neural approaches)
* Design algorithms that improve compression efficiency, perceptual quality, complexity, and sustainability.
* Implement inventions in software (primarily C++/Python) and run large-scale evaluations.
* Perform large-scale experiments and rigorous codec evaluations.
* Contribute to global standardization such as JVET and MPEG, write technical contributions, patents, and publications.
* Collaborate with world-leading experts across Ericsson and leading industry and academia.
* Be working in a dynamic team with opportunities for learning, taking on new responsibilities, impacting ways of working, and much more.


**Who you are:**
 We welcome outstanding graduates, postdocs and experienced researchers passionate about video coding innovation who:
   

  

* Hold M.Sc. or Ph.D. in a relevant technical field.
* Have a strong background in video coding research or development in industry and/or academia.
* Possess deep expertise in hybrid video coding and/or neural compression.
* Have expert knowledge video coding standards (e.g., HEVC/H.265 and VVC/H.266).
* Are exceptional problem solvers with a passion for innovation.
* Write high-quality, efficient code and are strong in C++ and/or Python.
* Are curious, collaborative,able to communicate complex ideas clearly and enjoy solving complex optimization problems combining theory and implementation.


**Nice to have:**
* Experience contributing to JVET or MPEG standardization
* Familarity with reference implementations (e.g., VTM, HM).
* Contributions to standardization, publications, or talks at conferences/industry events.
* Experience with ML frameworks applied to video compression.


**Why join Ericsson:**
* Be part of Europe’s leading tech company at the forefront of 6G and global standards.
* Work with a top-tier international research team and have your work validated on the world stage.
* Grow in a dynamic environment with strong mentorship, learning opportunities, and real impact.


**How To Apply**
 Send your application and describe how your experience and skills will advance state-of-the-art video coding for the AI-enabled 6G world.
   

  

**What happens once you apply?** 
 Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.We encourage you to consider applying to jobs where you might not meet all the criteria. We recognize that we all have transferrable skills, and we can support you with the skills that you need to develop.Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.
   

  

**Primary country and city:** 
 Sweden (SE) || Stockholm
   

  

**Job details:** 
 Researcher

title: Senior SAP Consultant
description:
**Senior SAP S/4 HANA PM EAM Migration Consultant** 




**Client Location:** 
 Solna, Sweden
 



**Working Model:** 
 Stockholm based; remote work possible with some travel to Stockholm for workshops
 



**Assignment Start:** 
 ASAP
 



**Assignment End:** 
 31st December 2026 (Possible Extension)
 



**Work Schedule:** 
 8 hours per day / 5 days a week
 



  





 Job Description
 


* Support pre and post migration validation activities.
* Support migration mapping and design activities.
* Create clear, structured migration scope blueprints.
* Apply deep SAP S/4HANA EAM and Plant Maintenance (PM) expertise, including prior involvement in ECC to S/4HANA migration projects.
* Translate business requirements into clear, comprehensive functional specifications and collaborate closely with technical teams on solution design.
* Leverage strong process knowledge of maintenance processes, master data, and integration points to perform fit gap analysis and recommend best practices aligned with S/4HANA capabilities.
* Collaborate effectively with stakeholders, demonstrating strong communication and stakeholder management skills and actively following up on open actions between the SAP migration and EAM teams.
* Support all key project phases including blueprinting, testing, training, and go live, producing high quality documentation and ensuring alignment with project goals.



  





 Candidate Requirements
 


* Strong understanding of SAP PM processes with at least 10 years of experience in implementation or support roles.
* Proven experience in S/4HANA implementations and migrations.
* Solid understanding and practical experience with SAP Fiori applications.
* Strong process understanding of standard processes in SAP PM and S/4HANA.
* Ability to communicate effectively between business stakeholders and other functional consultants.
* Strong knowledge of integration flows to and from SAP systems.
* Highly proficient in writing blueprints and accurately understanding and documenting requirements.
* Fluent in English and Swedish (speaking, reading, and writing) to communicate effectively with stakeholders in multinational environments.
* Strong knowledge of integrating SAP PM with other SAP modules such as Materials Management (MM).
* Experience working with Microsoft DevOps in SAP projects is a strong advantage.
* Comfortable working in agile teams, following Scrum methodologies.
* Used to collaborating closely with business stakeholders, developers, and test teams in cross functional setups.
* Optional: Basic knowledge of ABAP programming for troubleshooting and understanding custom code related to SAP PM, particularly in environments with significant custom developments.

title: Data and AI Transformation Lead & Country Delivery Lead - Sweden
description:
Data and AI Transformation Lead & Country Delivery Lead
  
  

Purpose of the Role
  
Serve as the Program Leader for a large‑scale Data Transformation initiative and act as the Delivery Leader for AI & Analytics (AIA) across the Nordics region. The role drives strategic vision, execution excellence, stakeholder alignment, and organisational readiness for data, cloud, and AI‑enabled transformation programs.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
1. Strategy & Vision
  
Define the data transformation vision, roadmap, and success metrics for the region.
  
Partner with executive leadership to shape and execute long‑term transformation strategy.
  
2. Program Leadership
  
Lead cross‑functional programs spanning technology, process, and data.
  
Establish governance, communication structures, and decision‑making frameworks to ensure smooth execution.
  
3. Stakeholder Alignment
  
Act as the bridge between business, technology, and functional teams.
  
Facilitate stakeholder engagement, manage expectations, and drive cohesive change adoption.
  
4. Change Management
  
Drive organisational readiness, communication, training, and culture‑shift initiatives.
  
Mitigate resistance and embed new ways of working across teams.
  
5. Talent Management
  
Lead, mentor, and inspire teams to foster a collaborative and innovative environment.
  
Plan for skill development, career progression, and nearshore capability expansion.
  
Bridge demand–supply gaps through proactive workforce planning.
  
6. Delivery Excellence
  
Oversee delivery of data and analytics programs from inception to completion.
  
Embed a culture of AI‑led continuous improvement and innovation.
  
Develop contingency plans to address potential risks.
  
7. Cross‑Sell & Up‑Sell
  
Engage with clients to understand needs and deliver tailored solutions.
  
Collaborate across teams to expand portfolio and client base.
  
Lead customer discussions to showcase practice capabilities and insights on Agentic AI.
  
  

Experience Required
  
Data and BI programs
  
Leading multiple transformation initiatives
  
Senior technical leadership
  
Strong understanding of data, cloud, and AI technologies
  
Ability to collaborate effectively with diverse technical and non‑technical stakeholders
  
  

Key Competencies
  
**Technical Expertise:** Advanced knowledge of platform architecture, cloud, and integration technologies
  
**Strategic Thinking:** Ability to align technology with business strategy
  
**Leadership:** Strong mentoring, influencing, and communication skills
  
**Innovation:** Ability to evaluate and adopt emerging technologies
  
**Collaboration:** Skilled at working across functions and geographies
  
**Problem‑Solving:** Strong analytical and decision‑making abilities
  
**Governance:** Experience establishing and enforcing technical standards

title: Named Enterprise Account Executive
description:
SLSQ327R41



Want to help solve the world's toughest problems with data and AI? This is what we do every day at Databricks.



Databricks operates at the leading edge of the Data and AI space. Our customers turn to us to lead the accelerated innovation their businesses need to gain first-mover advantage in today's ultra-competitive landscape.



We are looking for a creative, delivery-oriented Enterprise Account Executive to join the team in the Nordics to maximise the phenomenal market opportunity that exists for Databricks Sweden. As an Account Executive, you know how to sell innovation and value to existing customers, identify new use cases and grow consumption and can guide deals forward to compress decision cycles. You love understanding a product in depth and are passionate about communicating its value to customers and partners. You will be offered huge potential for career progression with the pace of the team's growth.



You will report to the Sales Director for Sweden and Finland.


**The impact you will have:**


* You will co-develop a business plan, with your team and ecosystem partners, that accelerates customer success to exceed quarterly/annual consumption and booking goals
* You will lead your team, customers and partners to identify impactful data and AI use cases whilst proving out their value on the Databricks Data Intelligence platform
* You will implement the data and AI transformation goals of your customer through a combination of strategic partnerships, well scoped professional services, training and targeted Executive engagement
* You will develop an understanding of technical product details and roadmap to build trust with executives and technical champions


**What we look for:**


* Exstensive experience selling complex solutions to Enterprise Customers
* You will have experience managing and leading complex, federated sales campaigns in major accounts
* You will have experience working in Data, Cloud industries with some technical sales experience
* Proof of exceeding sales quotas in high-growth Enterprise software companies
* You will have experience driving consumption and commit-based engagement models and strategies working with professional services and training teams
* You will have experience co-selling and scaling your business with Cloud Vendors (AWS, Azure and Google Cloud teams) and Global Solution Integrators (GSI)
* Experience of building effective champions, collaborative teams and partnerships to support execution of your account / territory plan
* Understanding of how to identify all key uses cases and buying centres in an opportunity to increase the impact of Databricks in an organisation
* Experience of following robust sales methodologies and process, e.g. account planning, MEDDPICC, Value Selling and accurate forecasting
* Bachelor's Degree or relevant work experience
* Fluency in English is required

**About Databricks**



Databricks is the data and AI company. More than 10,000 organizations worldwide — including Comcast, Condé Nast, Grammarly, and over 50% of the Fortune 500 — rely on the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform to unify and democratize data, analytics and AI. Databricks is headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the globe and was founded by the original creators of Lakehouse, Apache Spark™, Delta Lake and MLflow. To learn more, follow Databricks on Twitter, LinkedIn and Facebook.  

  

**Benefits**  

  

At Databricks, we strive to provide comprehensive benefits and perks that meet the needs of all of our employees. For specific details on the benefits offered in your region click here.

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**



At Databricks, we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive culture where everyone can excel. We take great care to ensure that our hiring practices are inclusive and meet equal employment opportunity standards. Individuals looking for employment at Databricks are considered without regard to age, color, disability, ethnicity, family or marital status, gender identity or expression, language, national origin, physical and mental ability, political affiliation, race, religion, sexual orientation, socio-economic status, veteran status, and other protected characteristics.


**Compliance**



If access to export-controlled technology or source code is required for performance of job duties, it is within Employer's discretion whether to apply for a U.S. government license for such positions, and Employer may decline to proceed with an applicant on this basis alone.
